_**User (2025-10-26 19:23:56Z)**_

lets revisit the buttons. i want you to analyze the following issues:
- list all places, where button candidates are fetched from teh backend
- list all places, where buttons are populated
- propose a robust, centralized function:
  - store current settings for all buttons
  - identify what button changed --> the trigger group
  - the changed button is fixed!
  - go through all button groups in the order of sesason, league, team, week, omit the buton group that triggered
  - initial constraints are the selection of the trigger group. 
  - when fetching candiates for a button group, fill all contraints
  - if the candidates for a group contain the current selection, keep the current selection and put it on the constraints list. 
  - if the candidates for a group do not ocntain the current selection, forfeit the current selection, dont add any constraints for the next group.
  - after all group candidates are fetched populate the button groups and mark the selection.
  - fetch the repsective contents from the backend

---

        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update team buttons\n */\nfunction updateTeamButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league || !currentState.week) {\n        // Clear team buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsTeam');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga, Saison und Woche aus\u003c/span\u003e';\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(teams =\u003e {\n            const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                       value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n            \n            // Select first team by default if none selected\n            let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\n            if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\n                teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\n                if (teamInput) {\n                    teamInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.team = teams[0];\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class SimpleFilterManager {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Load initial data for filters\r\n     */\r\n    async loadInitialData() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Get current database from URL\r\n            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n            const database = urlParams.get('database') || 'db_sim';\r\n            \r\n            if (this.mode === 'team') {\r\n                // Load teams for team mode\r\n                const teamsResponse = await fetch(&#96;/team/get_teams?database=${database}&#96;);\r\n                if (teamsResponse.ok) {\r\n                    this.availableData.teams = await teamsResponse.json();\r\n                    this.populateTeamDropdown();\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // Load leagues and seasons for league mode\r\n                const [leaguesResponse, seasonsResponse] = await Promise.all([\r\n                    fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?database=${database}&#96;),\r\n                    fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_seasons?database=${database}&#96;)\r\n                ]);\r\n                \r\n                if (leaguesResponse.ok) {\r\n                    this.availableData.leagues = await leaguesResponse.json();\r\n                    this.populateLeagueButtons();\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                if (seasonsResponse.ok) {\r\n                    this.availableData.seasons = await seasonsResponse.json();\r\n                    this.populateSeasonButtons();\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('❌ SimpleFilterManager: Failed to load initial data:', error);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Load initial data for filters\r\n     */\r\n    async loadInitialData() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Get current database from URL\r\n            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n            const database = urlParams.get('database') || 'db_sim';\r\n            \r\n            if (this.mode === 'team') {\r\n                // Load teams for team mode\r\n                const teamsResponse = await fetch(&#96;/team/get_teams?database=${database}&#96;);\r\n                if (teamsResponse.ok) {\r\n                    this.availableData.teams = await teamsResponse.json();\r\n                    this.populateTeamDropdown();\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // Load leagues and seasons for league mode\r\n                const [leaguesResponse, seasonsResponse] = await Promise.all([\r\n                    fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?database=${database}&#96;),\r\n                    fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_seasons?database=${database}&#96;)\r\n                ]);\r\n                \r\n                if (leaguesResponse.ok) {\r\n                    this.availableData.leagues = await leaguesResponse.json();\r\n                    this.populateLeagueButtons();\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                if (seasonsResponse.ok) {\r\n                    this.availableData.seasons = await seasonsResponse.json();\r\n                    this.populateSeasonButtons();\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('❌ SimpleFilterManager: Failed to load initial data:', error);\r\n        }\r\n    }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-sources-info')\r\ndef get_data_sources_info():\r\n    try:\r\n        # Get database parameter from request\r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        \r\n        if database:\r\n            # Use the specified database\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Validate the database\r\n            if not data_manager.validate_source(database):\r\n                return {\r\n                    'success': False,\r\n                    'message': f'Invalid data source: {database}',\r\n                    'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources()\r\n                }, 400\r\n            \r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': database,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(database),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }\r\n        else:\r\n            # Use current session-based approach, but reset to new default if needed\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Check if session has old default and reset to new default\r\n            session_source = data_manager._get_session_source()\r\n            current_default = data_manager.get_default_source()\r\n            if session_source != current_default:\r\n                # Reset to new default\r\n                data_manager.reset_to_default()\r\n            else:\r\n                # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n                data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-sources-info')\r\ndef get_data_sources_info():\r\n    try:\r\n        # Get database parameter from request\r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        \r\n        if database:\r\n            # Use the specified database\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Validate the database\r\n            if not data_manager.validate_source(database):\r\n                return {\r\n                    'success': False,\r\n                    'message': f'Invalid data source: {database}',\r\n                    'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources()\r\n                }, 400\r\n            \r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': database,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(database),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }\r\n        else:\r\n            # Use current session-based approach, but reset to new default if needed\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Check if session has old default and reset to new default\r\n            session_source = data_manager._get_session_source()\r\n            current_default = data_manager.get_default_source()\r\n            if session_source != current_default:\r\n                # Reset to new default\r\n                data_manager.reset_to_default()\r\n            else:\r\n                # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n                data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 148
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 42
          }
        },

'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                        &#96;).join('');\r\n                        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                        \r\n                        // Select the team if it was in URL\r\n                        if (selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 teams.includes(selectedTeam)) {\r\n                            const teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${selectedTeam}\"]&#96;);\r\n                            if (teamInput) {\r\n                                teamInput.checked = true;\r\n                            }\r\n                        }\r\n                    })\r\n                    .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                        console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                            \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                        &#96;;\r\n                    });\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        // Fetch weeks\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r\n                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                \r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                if (!selectedWeek \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    const firstWeekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (firstWeekInput) {\r\n                        firstWeekInput.checked = true;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        \r\n        // Fetch teams\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "// Update available options (weeks and teams) based on selected season and league\r"

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 314,
            "text": "    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r"

          },

            "lineNumber": 317,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 318,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 319,
            "text": "    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 320,
            "text": "        // Fetch weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 321,
            "text": "        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322,
            "text": "            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 327,
            "text": "                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 328,
            "text": "                &#96;).join('');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 329,

          },

            "text": "                // Select first week by default if none selected\r"

            "lineNumber": 332,

        "originalContents": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        // Fetch weeks\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r\n                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                \r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                if (!selectedWeek \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    const firstWeekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (firstWeekInput) {\r\n                        firstWeekInput.checked = true;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        \r\n        // Fetch teams\r\n",

            "text": "                        \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "// Display result in a container\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "function displayResult(containerId, data, isError = false) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(teams =\u003e {\r\n                const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \r\n                           value=\"${team}\" ${team === selectedTeam ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                \r\n                // Select first team by default if none selected\r\n                if (!selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    const firstTeamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (firstTeamInput) {\r\n                        firstTeamInput.checked = true;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n            .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                &#96;;\r\n            });\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Display result in a container\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 371
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 337
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update week buttons\n */\nfunction updateWeekButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) {\n        // Clear week buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsWeek');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga und Saison aus\u003c/span\u003e';\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(weeks =\u003e {\n            const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \n                       value=\"${week}\" ${week == currentState.week ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\n            \n            // Auto-select latest week if none selected\n            const weekInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"week\"]');\n            if (![...weekInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\n                const latestWeek = Math.max(...weeks);\n                const latestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${latestWeek}\"]&#96;);\n                if (latestInput) {\n                    latestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.week = latestWeek;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading weeks:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update week buttons\n */\nfunction updateWeekButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) {\n        // Clear week buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsWeek');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga und Saison aus\u003c/span\u003e';\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(weeks =\u003e {\n            const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \n                       value=\"${week}\" ${week == currentState.week ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\n            \n            // Auto-select latest week if none selected\n            const weekInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"week\"]');\n            if (![...weekInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\n                const latestWeek = Math.max(...weeks);\n                const latestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${latestWeek}\"]&#96;);\n                if (latestInput) {\n                    latestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.week = latestWeek;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading weeks:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update league buttons\n */\nfunction updateLeagueButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?season=${currentState.season}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(leagues =\u003e {\n            const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"league\" id=\"league_${league}\" \n                       value=\"${league}\" ${league === currentState.league ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"league_${league}\"\u003e${league}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;\n            \n            // Auto-select highest league if none selected\n            const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"league\"]');\n            if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 leagues.length \u003e 0) {\n                const sortedLeagues = leagues.sort();\n                const highestLeague = sortedLeagues[sortedLeagues.length - 1];\n                const highestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"league\"][value=\"${highestLeague}\"]&#96;);\n                if (highestInput) {\n                    highestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.league = highestLeague;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading leagues:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading leagues:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update league buttons\n */\nfunction updateLeagueButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?season=${currentState.season}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(leagues =\u003e {\n            const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"league\" id=\"league_${league}\" \n                       value=\"${league}\" ${league === currentState.league ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"league_${league}\"\u003e${league}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;\n            \n            // Auto-select highest league if none selected\n            const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"league\"]');\n            if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 leagues.length \u003e 0) {\n                const sortedLeagues = leagues.sort();\n                const highestLeague = sortedLeagues[sortedLeagues.length - 1];\n                const highestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"league\"][value=\"${highestLeague}\"]&#96;);\n                if (highestInput) {\n                    highestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.league = highestLeague;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading leagues:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading leagues:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",
        "range": {

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-source')\r\ndef get_data_source():\r\n    try:\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n        data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': True,\r\n            'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n            'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n            'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n            'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n        }\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"ERROR: Exception in get_data_source: {e}\")\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'current_source': 'db_sim',\r\n            'current_display_name': 'Simulated Data',\r\n            'available_sources': ['db_sim', 'db_real'],\r\n            'message': f'Server error: {str(e)}'\r\n        }, 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 151,
            "text": "@bp.route('/reload-data')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 152,
            "text": "def reload_data():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 198,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-source')\r\ndef get_data_source():\r\n    try:\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n        data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': True,\r\n            'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n            'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n            'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n            'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n        }\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"ERROR: Exception in get_data_source: {e}\")\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'current_source': 'db_sim',\r\n            'current_display_name': 'Simulated Data',\r\n            'available_sources': ['db_sim', 'db_real'],\r\n            'message': f'Server error: {str(e)}'\r\n        }, 500",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 243
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 150
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".database-notification.alert-success {\r\n    background-color: #d4edda;\r\n    border-left: 4px solid #28a745;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.database-notification.alert-danger {\r\n    background-color: #f8d7da;\r\n    border-left: 4px solid #dc3545;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.database-notification.alert-info {\r\n    background-color: #d1ecf1;\r\n    border-left: 4px solid #17a2b8;\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nclass DatabaseSelector {\r\n    constructor() {\r\n        this.isLoading = false;\r\n        this.currentSource = null;\r\n        this.sourcesInfo = {};\r\n        this.init();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async init() {\r\n        await this.loadSourcesInfo();\r\n        this.setupEventListeners();\r\n        this.updateDisplay();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async loadSourcesInfo() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Get current database from URL\r\n            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n            const currentDatabase = urlParams.get('database');\r\n            \r\n            // Build the URL with database parameter if present\r\n            let url = '/get-data-sources-info';\r\n            if (currentDatabase) {\r\n                url += &#96;?database=${encodeURIComponent(currentDatabase)}&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            const response = await fetch(url, {\r\n                headers: { 'Cache-Control': 'no-cache' }\r\n            });\r\n            const data = await response.json();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('Sources info response:', data);\r\n            \r\n            if (data.success) {\r\n                this.sourcesInfo = data.sources_info;\r\n                this.currentSource = data.current_source;\r\n                console.log('Loaded sources info:', this.sourcesInfo);\r\n                console.log('Current source:', this.currentSource);\r\n                this.renderOptions();\r\n            } else {\r\n                console.error('Failed to load sources info:', data.message);\r\n                this.showError('Failed to load database information');\r\n            }\r\n        ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        async function refreshGenericComponents() {\r\n            console.log('🔄 Refreshing generic components...');\r\n            \r\n            const methods = [\r\n                'refreshCurrentData',\r\n                'handleDataSourceChange',\r\n                'updateContent',\r\n                'renderContent'\r\n            ];\r\n            \r\n            for (const method of methods) {\r\n                if (typeof window[method] === 'function') {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        await window[method]();\r\n                    } catch (error) {\r\n                        console.warn(&#96;Error calling ${method}:&#96;, error);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Helper functions for database parameter handling\r\n        function getCurrentDatabase() {\r\n            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n            const database = urlParams.get('database') || 'db_real';\r\n            console.log('🔄 getCurrentDatabase called, returning:', database);\r\n            return database;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        function addDatabaseParam(url) {\r\n            const database = getCurrentDatabase();\r\n            if (database) {\r\n                // Handle both string and URL objects\r\n                const urlString = url.toString();\r\n                const separator = urlString.includes('?') ? '\u0026' : '?';\r\n                return &#96;${urlString}${separator}database=${encodeURIComponent(database)}&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n            return url;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        function fetchWithDatabase(url, options = {}) {\r\n            const urlWithDatabase = addDatabaseParam(url);\r\n            console.log('🔄 fetchWithDatabase called:', { originalUrl: url, urlWithDatabase });\r\n            return fetch(urlWithDatabase, options);\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/script\u003e\r\n    \r\n    {% block scripts %}{% endblock %}\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Footer --\u003e\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        ],
        "originalContents": "        async function refreshGenericComponents() {\r\n            console.log('🔄 Refreshing generic components...');\r\n            \r\n            const methods = [\r\n                'refreshCurrentData',\r\n                'handleDataSourceChange',\r\n                'updateContent',\r\n                'renderContent'\r\n            ];\r\n            \r\n            for (const method of methods) {\r\n                if (typeof window[method] === 'function') {\r\n                    try {\r\n                        await window[method]();\r\n                    } catch (error) {\r\n                        console.warn(&#96;Error calling ${method}:&#96;, error);\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Helper functions for database parameter handling\r\n        function getCurrentDatabase() {\r\n            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n            const database = urlParams.get('database') || 'db_real';\r\n            console.log('🔄 getCurrentDatabase called, returning:', database);\r\n            return database;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        function addDatabaseParam(url) {\r\n            const database = getCurrentDatabase();\r\n            if (database) {\r\n                // Handle both string and URL objects\r\n                const urlString = url.toString();\r\n                const separator = urlString.includes('?') ? '\u0026' : '?';\r\n                return &#96;${urlString}${separator}database=${encodeURIComponent(database)}&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n            return url;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        function fetchWithDatabase(url, options = {}) {\r\n            const urlWithDatabase = addDatabaseParam(url);\r\n            console.log('🔄 fetchWithDatabase called:', { originalUrl: url, urlWithDatabase });\r\n            return fetch(urlWithDatabase, options);\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/script\u003e\r\n    \r\n    {% block scripts %}{% endblock %}\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Footer --\u003e\r\n",

        "contents": "class SimpleFilterManager {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Populate team buttons with available teams (for league mode)\r\n     * Only shows teams if league, season, AND week are all selected\r\n     */\r\n    async populateTeamButtons(state) {\r\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsTeam');\r\n        if (!container) {\r\n            console.warn('SimpleFilterManager: Team buttons container not found');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Get current state to determine prerequisites\r\n        const currentState = state || this.urlStateManager.getState();\r\n        \r\n        // Only show team buttons if league AND season are selected\r\n        if (!currentState.league || !currentState.season) {\r\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga und Saison aus\u003c/span\u003e';\r\n            console.log('📊 SimpleFilterManager: Team buttons hidden - prerequisites not met');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if (!this.availableData.teams || this.availableData.teams.length === 0) {\r\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eKeine Teams verfügbar\u003c/span\u003e';\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        const selectedTeam = currentState.team || '';\r\n        \r\n        // Create team buttons\r\n        const buttonsHtml = this.availableData.teams.map(team =\u003e {\r\n            const isChecked = team === selectedTeam;\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;\r\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team}\" \r\n                       value=\"${team}\" ${isChecked ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        }).join('');\r\n        \r\n        container.innerHTML = buttonsHtml;\r\n        console.log(&#96;📊 SimpleFilterManager: Populated team buttons with ${this.availableData.teams.length} teams, selected: ${selectedTeam}&#96;);\r\n    }",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Populate team buttons with available teams (for league mode)\r\n     * Only shows teams if league, season, AND week are all selected\r\n     */\r\n    async populateTeamButtons(state) {\r\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsTeam');\r\n        if (!container) {\r\n            console.warn('SimpleFilterManager: Team buttons container not found');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Get current state to determine prerequisites\r\n        const currentState = state || this.urlStateManager.getState();\r\n        \r\n        // Only show team buttons if league AND season are selected\r\n        if (!currentState.league || !currentState.season) {\r\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga und Saison aus\u003c/span\u003e';\r\n            console.log('📊 SimpleFilterManager: Team buttons hidden - prerequisites not met');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if (!this.availableData.teams || this.availableData.teams.length === 0) {\r\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eKeine Teams verfügbar\u003c/span\u003e';\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        const selectedTeam = currentState.team || '';\r\n        \r\n        // Create team buttons\r\n        const buttonsHtml = this.availableData.teams.map(team =\u003e {\r\n            const isChecked = team === selectedTeam;\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;\r\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team}\" \r\n                       value=\"${team}\" ${isChecked ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        }).join('');\r\n        \r\n        container.innerHTML = buttonsHtml;\r\n        console.log(&#96;📊 SimpleFilterManager: Populated team buttons with ${this.availableData.teams.length} teams, selected: ${selectedTeam}&#96;);\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update team buttons\n */\nfunction updateTeamButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league || !currentState.week) {\n        // Clear team buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsTeam');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga, Saison und Woche aus\u003c/span\u003e';\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(teams =\u003e {\n            const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                       value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n            \n            // Select first team by default if none selected\n            let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\n            if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\n                teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\n                if (teamInput) {\n                    teamInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.team = teams[0];\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update team buttons\n */\nfunction updateTeamButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league || !currentState.week) {\n        // Clear team buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsTeam');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga, Saison und Woche aus\u003c/span\u003e';\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(teams =\u003e {\n            const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                       value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n            \n            // Select first team by default if none selected\n            let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\n            if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\n                teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\n                if (teamInput) {\n                    teamInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.team = teams[0];\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Alias for updateTeamButtons - used by SimpleFilterManager\n */\nfunction updateLeagueTeamButtons(teams) {\n    if (teams) {\n        // If teams array is provided, use it directly \n        console.log('Updating league team buttons with provided teams:', teams);\n        const currentState = { season: '', league: '', week: '', team: '' }; // Get from URL or state\n        \n        const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n            \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                   value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n        &#96;).join('');\n        \n        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n    } else {\n        // Fall back to the standard updateTeamButtons\n        updateTeamButtons();\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Alias for updateTeamButtons - used by SimpleFilterManager\n */\nfunction updateLeagueTeamButtons(teams) {\n    if (teams) {\n        // If teams array is provided, use it directly \n        console.log('Updating league team buttons with provided teams:', teams);\n        const currentState = { season: '', league: '', week: '', team: '' }; // Get from URL or state\n        \n        const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n            \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                   value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n        &#96;).join('');\n        \n        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n    } else {\n        // Fall back to the standard updateTeamButtons\n        updateTeamButtons();\n    }\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 235
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 199
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        // Fetch weeks\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r\n                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                \r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                if (!selectedWeek \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    const firstWeekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (firstWeekInput) {\r\n                        firstWeekInput.checked = true;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        \r\n        // Fetch teams\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        // Fetch weeks\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r\n                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                \r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                if (!selectedWeek \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    const firstWeekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (firstWeekInput) {\r\n                        firstWeekInput.checked = true;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        \r\n        // Fetch teams\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update league buttons\n */\nfunction updateLeagueButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?season=${currentState.season}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(leagues =\u003e {\n            const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"league\" id=\"league_${league}\" \n                       value=\"${league}\" ${league === currentState.league ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"league_${league}\"\u003e${league}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;\n            \n            // Auto-select highest league if none selected\n            const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"league\"]');\n            if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 leagues.length \u003e 0) {\n                const sortedLeagues = leagues.sort();\n                const highestLeague = sortedLeagues[sortedLeagues.length - 1];\n                const highestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"league\"][value=\"${highestLeague}\"]&#96;);\n                if (highestInput) {\n                    highestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.league = highestLeague;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading leagues:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading leagues:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update league buttons\n */\nfunction updateLeagueButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?season=${currentState.season}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(leagues =\u003e {\n            const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"league\" id=\"league_${league}\" \n                       value=\"${league}\" ${league === currentState.league ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"league_${league}\"\u003e${league}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;\n            \n            // Auto-select highest league if none selected\n            const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"league\"]');\n            if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 leagues.length \u003e 0) {\n                const sortedLeagues = leagues.sort();\n                const highestLeague = sortedLeagues[sortedLeagues.length - 1];\n                const highestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"league\"][value=\"${highestLeague}\"]&#96;);\n                if (highestInput) {\n                    highestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.league = highestLeague;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading leagues:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading leagues:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(teams =\u003e {\r\n                const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \r\n                           value=\"${team}\" ${team === selectedTeam ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                \r\n                // Select first team by default if none selected\r\n                if (!selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    const firstTeamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (firstTeamInput) {\r\n                        firstTeamInput.checked = true;\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n            .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                &#96;;\r\n            });\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Display result in a container\r\n",

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\n{% block content %}\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\n\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\n            background-color: #0d6efd !important;\n            border-color: #0d6efd !important;\n            color: white !important;\n        }\n        \n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\n        }\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Selection Message --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n",

'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                        &#96;).join('');\r\n                        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                        \r\n                        // Select the team if it was in URL\r\n                        if (selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 teams.includes(selectedTeam)) {\r\n                            const teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${selectedTeam}\"]&#96;);\r\n                            if (teamInput) {\r\n                                teamInput.checked = true;\r\n                            }\r\n                        }\r\n                    })\r\n                    .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                        console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                            \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                        &#96;;\r\n                    });\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n",

        "originalContents": "                fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n                    .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                    .then(teams =\u003e {\r\n                        const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\r\n                            \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \r\n                                   value=\"${team}\" ${team === selectedTeam ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                        &#96;).join('');\r\n                        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                        \r\n                        // Select the team if it was in URL\r\n                        if (selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 teams.includes(selectedTeam)) {\r\n                            const teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${selectedTeam}\"]&#96;);\r\n                            if (teamInput) {\r\n                                teamInput.checked = true;\r\n                            }\r\n                        }\r\n                    })\r\n                    .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                        console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                            \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                        &#96;;\r\n                    });\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update week buttons\n */\nfunction updateWeekButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) {\n        // Clear week buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsWeek');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga und Saison aus\u003c/span\u003e';\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(weeks =\u003e {\n            const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \n                       value=\"${week}\" ${week == currentState.week ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\n            \n            // Auto-select latest week if none selected\n            const weekInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"week\"]');\n            if (![...weekInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\n                const latestWeek = Math.max(...weeks);\n                const latestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${latestWeek}\"]&#96;);\n                if (latestInput) {\n                    latestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.week = latestWeek;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading weeks:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "        .then(response =\u003e response.json())"

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "function updateTeamButtons() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 172,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update week buttons\n */\nfunction updateWeekButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) {\n        // Clear week buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsWeek');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eWählen Sie Liga und Saison aus\u003c/span\u003e';\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(weeks =\u003e {\n            const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \n                       value=\"${week}\" ${week == currentState.week ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\n            \n            // Auto-select latest week if none selected\n            const weekInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"week\"]');\n            if (![...weekInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\n                const latestWeek = Math.max(...weeks);\n                const latestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${latestWeek}\"]&#96;);\n                if (latestInput) {\n                    latestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.week = latestWeek;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading weeks:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 171
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 51
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/static/js/league/league-filter-utils.js"
      },
      "score": 0.2431640625

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class ContentRenderer {\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    /**\n     * Render content blocks for the current mode\n     */\n    async renderContentBlocks(mode, state) {\n        const modeConfig = this.contentModes[mode];\n        console.log(&#96;ContentRenderer: Rendering blocks for ${mode}:&#96;, modeConfig.blocks);\n        \n        if (mode === 'no-selection') {\n            // Clear all content areas when no team selected\n            this.clearAllContent();\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // Render blocks based on mode configuration\n        const renderPromises = [];\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content blocks for team-history and league-comparison\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('team-history') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['team-history']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['team-history'].renderWithData(state));\n        }\n        \n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('league-comparison') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['league-comparison']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['league-comparison'].renderWithData(state));\n        }\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content block for clutch analysis\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('clutch-analysis') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis']) {\n            console.log('ContentRenderer: Adding clutch-analysis block to render queue');\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis'].renderWithData(state));\n        } else {\n            console.log('ContentRenderer: Clutch analysis block skipped - included:', modeConfig.blocks.includes('clutch-analysis'), 'available:', !!this.contentBlocks['clutch-analysis']);\n        }\n        \n        // Phase 3: Use content block for consistency metrics\n        if (modeConfig.blocks.includes('consistency-metrics') \u0026\u0026 this.contentBlocks['consistency-metrics']) {\n            renderPromises.push(this.contentBlocks['consistency-metrics'].renderWithData(state));\n        }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class RouteTestBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Create the route testing interface HTML\r\n     */\r\n    createRouteTestingInterface(filterState) {\r\n        const routes = this.getAPIRoutes();\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"route-test-block\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eAPI Route Testing\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm\" onclick=\"window.testAllRoutes()\" id=\"testAllBtn\"\u003e\r\n                            Test All Routes\r\n                        \u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm\" onclick=\"window.clearResults()\" id=\"clearBtn\"\u003e\r\n                            Clear Results\r\n                        \u003c/button\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"current-filters mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003eCurrent Filters:\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"filter-display\"\u003e\r\n                        ${this.renderCurrentFilters(filterState)}\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"accordion\" id=\"routeAccordion\"\u003e\r\n                    ${routes.map((category, idx) =\u003e this.renderRouteCategory(category, idx, filterState)).join('')}\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Create the route testing interface HTML\r\n     */\r\n    createRouteTestingInterface(filterState) {\r\n        const routes = this.getAPIRoutes();\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"route-test-block\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eAPI Route Testing\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm\" onclick=\"window.testAllRoutes()\" id=\"testAllBtn\"\u003e\r\n                            Test All Routes\r\n                        \u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm\" onclick=\"window.clearResults()\" id=\"clearBtn\"\u003e\r\n                            Clear Results\r\n                        \u003c/button\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"current-filters mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003eCurrent Filters:\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"filter-display\"\u003e\r\n                        ${this.renderCurrentFilters(filterState)}\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"accordion\" id=\"routeAccordion\"\u003e\r\n                    ${routes.map((category, idx) =\u003e this.renderRouteCategory(category, idx, filterState)).join('')}\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    examplesList.innerHTML = examples.map(example =\u003e {\r\n        // Build query string from parameters\r\n        const params = new URLSearchParams();\r\n        Object.entries(example.params).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n            if (value) {\r\n                params.set(key, value);\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        const queryString = params.toString();\r\n        \r\n        // Determine the appropriate URL based on the example type\r\n        let url;\r\n        if (example.label.includes('Spieler Statistiken')) {\r\n            url = &#96;{{ url_for('player.stats') }}?${queryString}&#96;;\r\n        } else if (example.label.includes('Team')) {\r\n            url = &#96;{{ url_for('team.stats') }}?${queryString}&#96;;\r\n        } else {\r\n            url = &#96;{{ url_for('league.stats') }}?${queryString}&#96;;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003e\r\n                \u003ca href=\"${url}\" \r\n                   class=\"text-decoration-none\"\u003e\r\n                    ${example.label}\r\n                \u003c/a\u003e\r\n            \u003c/li\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    }).join('');\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "    // Generate the example links\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "    examplesList.innerHTML = examples.map(example =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        // Build query string from parameters\r"

        "originalContents": "    examplesList.innerHTML = examples.map(example =\u003e {\r\n        // Build query string from parameters\r\n        const params = new URLSearchParams();\r\n        Object.entries(example.params).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n            if (value) {\r\n                params.set(key, value);\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        const queryString = params.toString();\r\n        \r\n        // Determine the appropriate URL based on the example type\r\n        let url;\r\n        if (example.label.includes('Spieler Statistiken')) {\r\n            url = &#96;{{ url_for('player.stats') }}?${queryString}&#96;;\r\n        } else if (example.label.includes('Team')) {\r\n            url = &#96;{{ url_for('team.stats') }}?${queryString}&#96;;\r\n        } else {\r\n            url = &#96;{{ url_for('league.stats') }}?${queryString}&#96;;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003e\r\n                \u003ca href=\"${url}\" \r\n                   class=\"text-decoration-none\"\u003e\r\n                    ${example.label}\r\n                \u003c/a\u003e\r\n            \u003c/li\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    }).join('');\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 15,
            "line": 204
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 171
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/index.html"
      },
      "score": 0.2346556931734085
    }
  ]
}

        "contents": "/**\r\n * Simple Filter Manager\r\n * \r\n * Simplified version without complex event bus system\r\n * Just manages filter state and UI synchronization\r\n */\r\n\r\nclass SimpleFilterManager {\r\n    constructor(urlStateManager, mode = 'team') {\r\n        this.urlStateManager = urlStateManager;\r\n        this.mode = mode; // 'team' or 'league'\r\n        this.isInitializing = false;\r\n        this.isProcessingState = false;\r\n        this.hasAutoSelected = false;\r\n        this.previousState = {};\r\n        this.availableData = {\r\n            teams: [],\r\n            seasons: [],\r\n            weeks: [],\r\n            leagues: []\r\n        };\r\n        \r\n        // Track currently selected buttons for deselection detection\r\n        this.selectedButtons = new Map(); // Map of filter type to value\r\n        \r\n        // Listen for state changes from URL manager\r\n        this.urlStateManager.onStateChange((state) =\u003e {\r\n            this.handleStateChange(state);\r\n        });\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "/**\r\n * Simple Filter Manager\r\n * \r\n * Simplified version without complex event bus system\r\n * Just manages filter state and UI synchronization\r\n */\r\n\r\nclass SimpleFilterManager {\r\n    constructor(urlStateManager, mode = 'team') {\r\n        this.urlStateManager = urlStateManager;\r\n        this.mode = mode; // 'team' or 'league'\r\n        this.isInitializing = false;\r\n        this.isProcessingState = false;\r\n        this.hasAutoSelected = false;\r\n        this.previousState = {};\r\n        this.availableData = {\r\n            teams: [],\r\n            seasons: [],\r\n            weeks: [],\r\n            leagues: []\r\n        };\r\n        \r\n        // Track currently selected buttons for deselection detection\r\n        this.selectedButtons = new Map(); // Map of filter type to value\r\n        \r\n        // Listen for state changes from URL manager\r\n        this.urlStateManager.onStateChange((state) =\u003e {\r\n            this.handleStateChange(state);\r\n        });\r\n    }",
