    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function setupGlobalEventListeners() {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    // Centralized event listener for all changes\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = event.target.value;\r\n            console.log('Season changed to:', selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            // Update analysis based on selection state\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                    // Team + specific season selected\r\n                    console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                    console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n                console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n                updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": " * Initialize the team stats page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": " * Only runs legacy initialization if modern state management is not active\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": " */"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    // Centralized event listener for all changes\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = event.target.value;\r\n            console.log('Season changed to:', selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            // Update analysis based on selection state\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                    // Team + specific season selected\r\n                    console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                    console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n                console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n                updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/**\r\n * League Data Utilities\r\n * \r\n * Data fetching and display functions for league statistics\r\n * Extracted from monolithic league stats template\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Update team details table\r\n */\r\nfunction updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = currentState?.week || document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = currentState?.team || document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = currentState?.teamView || document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    let endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    let viewMode = undefined;\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedView === 'new') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_individual_scores_table';\r\n    } else if (selectedView === 'newFull') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table';\r\n        viewMode = 'full';\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    const headerElement = document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata');\r\n    if (headerElement) {\r\n        headerElement.innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    const params = {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: false,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    if (viewMode) {\r\n        params.view_mode = viewMode;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, params);\r\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": " * League Data Utilities\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": " * \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": " * Data fetching and display functions for league statistics\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": " * Extracted from monolithic league stats template\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": " */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": " * Update team details table\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": " */\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    const selectedWeek = currentState?.week || document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    const selectedTeam = currentState?.team || document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    const selectedView = currentState?.teamView || document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    let endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    let viewMode = undefined;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "    if (selectedView === 'new') {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        endpoint = '/league/get_team_individual_scores_table';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "    } else if (selectedView === 'newFull') {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "        endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "        viewMode = 'full';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        return;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    // Update header\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    const headerElement = document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    if (headerElement) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        headerElement.innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    const params = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        season: selectedSeason,\r"
          },
          {

        "originalContents": "/**\r\n * League Data Utilities\r\n * \r\n * Data fetching and display functions for league statistics\r\n * Extracted from monolithic league stats template\r\n */\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Update team details table\r\n */\r\nfunction updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = currentState?.week || document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = currentState?.team || document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = currentState?.teamView || document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    let endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    let viewMode = undefined;\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedView === 'new') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_individual_scores_table';\r\n    } else if (selectedView === 'newFull') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table';\r\n        viewMode = 'full';\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    const headerElement = document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata');\r\n    if (headerElement) {\r\n        headerElement.innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    const params = {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: false,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    if (viewMode) {\r\n        params.view_mode = viewMode;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, params);\r\n}",

_**Agent**_

Now I understand the issue! The team stats page uses a `<select>` dropdown for teams, but our `CentralizedButtonManager` is designed to work with button groups. The team dropdown needs to be populated separately. Let me check what the team stats app is supposed to do:


_**Agent**_

        "originalContents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    def get_available_weeks(self, team_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible weeks for a given team and season\"\"\"\r\n        # Handle \"all seasons\" case (empty string, None, or \"All\")\r\n        if not season or season == \"\" or season == \"All\":\r\n            # Get all seasons for this team\r\n            seasons = self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)\r\n            if not seasons:\r\n                return []\r\n            \r\n            # Get all weeks across all seasons\r\n            all_weeks = set()\r\n            for s in seasons:\r\n                # Get the league for this season\r\n                leagues = self.server.get_leagues(team_name=team_name, season=s)\r\n                if leagues and len(leagues) \u003e 0:\r\n                    league = leagues[0]  # Take the first league\r\n                    # Call get_weeks with correct parameters (season, league)\r\n                    weeks = self.server.get_weeks(league_name=league, season=s)\r\n                    if weeks:\r\n                        all_weeks.update(weeks)\r\n            \r\n            return sorted(list(all_weeks))\r\n        else:\r\n            # Get the league for this specific season\r\n            leagues = self.server.get_leagues(team_name=team_name, season=season)\r\n            if leagues and len(leagues) \u003e 0:\r\n                league = leagues[0]  # Take the first league\r\n                return self.server.get_weeks(season=season, league=league)\r\n            else:\r\n                return []\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team_name: str, season: str) -\u003e TeamStatistics:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics\"\"\"\r\n        return self.stats_service.get_team_statistics(team_name, season)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/get_teams')\r\ndef get_teams():\r\n    try:\r\n        team_service = get_team_service()\r\n        teams = team_service.get_all_teams(\r\n            league_name=None,\r\n            season=None\r\n        )\r\n        return jsonify(teams)\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_teams: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate weekly performances\r\n        weekly_performances = {}\r\n        for week in weeks:\r\n            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r\n            \r\n            # Get player scores for this week\r\n            player_scores = {\r\n                p.player_name: p.score\r\n                for p in week_players\r\n            }\r\n           \r\n            weekly_performances[week] = TeamWeekPerformance(\r\n                team_id=team,\r\n                team_name=team,\r\n                week=week,\r\n                total_score=sum(p.score for p in week_players),\r\n                points=sum(p.points for p in week_players),\r\n                number_of_games=len([p.score for p in week_players]),\r\n                player_scores=player_scores\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        all_scores = [p.score for p in raw_team_data.players]",

        "originalContents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate weekly performances\r\n        weekly_performances = {}\r\n        for week in weeks:\r\n            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r\n            \r\n            # Get player scores for this week\r\n            player_scores = {\r\n                p.player_name: p.score\r\n                for p in week_players\r\n            }\r\n           \r\n            weekly_performances[week] = TeamWeekPerformance(\r\n                team_id=team,\r\n                team_name=team,\r\n                week=week,\r\n                total_score=sum(p.score for p in week_players),\r\n                points=sum(p.points for p in week_players),\r\n                number_of_games=len([p.score for p in week_players]),\r\n                player_scores=player_scores\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        all_scores = [p.score for p in raw_team_data.players]",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/team/\u003canalysis\u003e')\r\ndef team_stats(analysis):\r\n    season = session.get('selected_season', 'all')\r\n    return render_template('team/stats.html', analysis=analysis, season=season)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import pandas as pd\r\nfrom data_access.pd_dataframes import fetch_column, fetch_data\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import calculate_score_average_player, calculate_games_count_player\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import PlayerStatistics\r\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Any, Optional\r\n\r\nclass PlayerService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.data_manager = DataManager(source=database) if database else DataManager()\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_players(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Get list of all players for selection\"\"\"\r\n        players = fetch_column(\r\n            database_df=self.data_manager.df,\r\n            column_name=Columns.player_name,\r\n            unique=True,\r\n            as_list=True\r\n        )\r\n        return [{'id': name, 'name': name} for name in sorted(players)]\r\n\r\n    def get_player_statistics(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e PlayerStatistics:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive player statistics\"\"\"\r\n        return self.stats_service.get_player_statistics(player_name, season)",

        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\nfrom data_access.pd_dataframes import fetch_column, fetch_data\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import calculate_score_average_player, calculate_games_count_player\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import PlayerStatistics\r\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Any, Optional\r\n\r\nclass PlayerService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.data_manager = DataManager(source=database) if database else DataManager()\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_players(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Get list of all players for selection\"\"\"\r\n        players = fetch_column(\r\n            database_df=self.data_manager.df,\r\n            column_name=Columns.player_name,\r\n            unique=True,\r\n            as_list=True\r\n        )\r\n        return [{'id': name, 'name': name} for name in sorted(players)]\r\n\r\n    def get_player_statistics(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e PlayerStatistics:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive player statistics\"\"\"\r\n        return self.stats_service.get_player_statistics(player_name, season)",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_performance_chart(self, season: str, league: str, team_id: Optional[str] = None) -\u003e PlotData:\n\n        ...\n\n        for _, row in unique_events_df.iterrows():\n            event = {\n                \"Season\": row[Columns.season],\n                \"League\": row[Columns.league_name],\n                \"Week\": row[Columns.week],\n                \"Date\": row[Columns.date]\n            }\n            events.append(event)\n        \n        return events\n\n    def get_weeks(self, league_name: str = None, season: str = None) -\u003e List[int]:\n        \"\"\"Get available weeks for a league and season\"\"\"\n        #if not league_name or not season:\n            # Return empty list if parameters are missing\n        #    return []\n        return self.adapter.get_weeks(season, league_name)\n\n    def get_valid_combinations(self) -\u003e Dict[str, Dict[str, List[str]]]:\n        \"\"\"Get valid combinations of season, league, and weeks\"\"\"\n        # This is a placeholder implementation - adjust based on your data structure\n        result = {}\n        seasons = self.get_seasons()\n        \n        for season in seasons:\n            result[season] = {}\n            leagues = self.get_leagues()\n            \n            for league in leagues:\n                weeks = self.get_weeks(league_name=league, season=season)\n                if weeks:\n                    result[season][league] = weeks\n        \n        return result\n\n    def get_teams_in_league_season(self, league: str, season: str) -\u003e List[str]:\n        \"\"\"Get teams in a specific league and season\"\"\"\n        # Create a query to get all teams in this league and season\n        query = LeagueQuery(season=season, league=league)\n        \n        # Get the data\n        league_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(query.to_filter_dict())\n        \n        if league_data.empty:\n            return []\n        \n        # Extract unique team names\n        if 'Team' in league_data.columns:\n            teams = sorted(league_data['Team'].unique().tolist())\n            return teams\n        \n        return []",

Calculate team contribution\r\n        team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            filters={\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': player_data[Columns.team_name].iloc[0], 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n        team_contribution = (season_summary.total_score / team_data[Columns.score].sum()) * 100\r\n        \r\n        return PlayerStatistics(\r\n            name=player,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            weekly_performances=weekly_performances,\r\n            season_summary=season_summary,\r\n            team_contribution=team_contribution\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def get_team_series_data(self, team_name: str, season: str, league: str, \r\n                            x_field: str, y_field: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team series data using the new SeriesData class\"\"\"\r\n        raw_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_team_series_data(team_name, season, league)\r\n        \r\n        series_data = calculate_series_data_from_dataframe(\r\n            df=pd.DataFrame(raw_data),\r\n            x_field=x_field,\r\n            y_field=y_field,\r\n            name=f\"{team_name} {y_field}\",\r\n            label_x=x_field,\r\n            label_y=y_field,\r\n            query_params={\"team\": team_name, \"season\": season, \"league\": league}\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        return series_data.to_dict()",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\nimport datetime\nimport pandas as pd\n\n\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\nfrom data_access.models.league_models import LeagueQuery, TeamSeasonPerformance, LeagueStandings, TeamWeeklyPerformance\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service\nfrom app.models.table_data import TableData, ColumnGroup, Column, PlotData, TileData\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import LeagueStatistics, LeagueResults\nfrom app.models.series_data import SeriesData\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\nfrom itertools import accumulate\nfrom app.config.debug_config import debug_config\n# from data_access.series_data import calculate_series_data, get_player_series_data, get_team_series_data\n\n\nclass LeagueService:\n    def __init__(self, adapter_type=DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database: str = None):\n        self.database = database\n        self.adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(adapter_type, database=database)\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\n        \n        # Register this adapter with DataManager for automatic refresh\n        try:\n            from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\n            data_manager = DataManager()\n            data_manager.register_server_instance(self)\n        except ImportError:\n            # DataManager not available, continue without registration\n            pass\n\n    def refresh_data_adapter(self, database: str = None):\n        \"\"\"Refresh the data adapter with the current data source\"\"\"\n        if database:\n            self.database = database\n        debug_config.log_service('LeagueService', 'refresh_adapter', f\"database={self.database}\")\n        self.adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=self.database)",

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: docs/TEAM_DROPDOWN_FIX.md</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 173, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,173 @@
- 
+ # Team Dropdown Fix
+ 
+ ## Problem
+ The team stats page (&#96;/team/stats&#96;) had an empty team dropdown because the &#96;CentralizedButtonManager&#96; is designed for button groups, not select dropdowns. The team dropdown needed separate population logic.
+ 
+ ## Root Cause
+ - Team stats page uses a &#96;&lt;select&gt;&#96; dropdown for team selection
+ - &#96;CentralizedButtonManager&#96; only handles button groups (season, league, week)
+ - No logic existed to populate the team dropdown with data from the backend
+ 
+ ## Solution Applied
+ 
+ ### 1. **Added Team Dropdown Population Method** 🏢
+ **File**: &#96;app/static/js/team-stats-app.js&#96;
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ /**
+  * Populate team dropdown with all available teams
+  */
+ async populateTeamDropdown() {
+     try {
+         console.log('🏢 Populating team dropdown...');
+         
+         // Get current database from URL or default
+         const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
+         const database = urlParams.get('database') || 'db_real';
+         
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;/team/get_teams?database=${database}&#96;);
+         if (!response.ok) {
+             throw new Error(&#96;HTTP error! status: ${response.status}&#96;);
+         }
+         
+         const data = await response.json();
+         console.log('📊 Received teams data:', data);
+         
+         const teamSelect = document.getElementById('teamSelect');
+         if (!teamSelect) {
+             console.warn('Team select element not found');
+             return;
+         }
+         
+         // Clear existing options except the first one (placeholder)
+         while (teamSelect.options.length &gt; 1) {
+             teamSelect.remove(1);
+         }
+         
+         // Add team options
+         if (data &amp;&amp; Array.isArray(data)) {
+             data.forEach(team =&gt; {
+                 const option = document.createElement('option');
+                 option.value = team;
+                 option.textContent = team;
+                 teamSelect.appendChild(option);
+             });
+             
+             console.log(&#96;✅ Populated team dropdown with ${data.length} teams&#96;);
+         } else {
+             console.warn('No teams data received or invalid format:', data);
+         }
+         
+     } catch (error) {
+         console.error('❌ Error populating team dropdown:', error);
+         
+         // Show error in dropdown
+         const teamSelect = document.getElementById('teamSelect');
+         if (teamSelect) {
+             teamSelect.innerHTML = &#96;
+                 &lt;option value=""&gt;Fehler beim Laden der Teams&lt;/option&gt;
+             &#96;;
+         }
+     }
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### 2. **Integrated into Initialization** 🔄
+ **File**: &#96;app/static/js/team-stats-app.js&#96;
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ // Centralized button manager for team mode with content rendering callback
+ this.buttonManager = new CentralizedButtonManager(this.urlStateManager, 'team', (state) =&gt; {
+     console.log('🔄 TeamStatsApp: Button state changed, rendering content:', state);
+     this.currentState = { ...state };
+     if (this.contentRenderer) {
+         this.contentRenderer.renderContent(state);
+     }
+ });
+ await this.buttonManager.initialize();
+ 
+ // Populate team dropdown
+ await this.populateTeamDropdown();
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## Backend Integration
+ 
+ ### **Existing API Endpoint** ✅
+ **Route**: &#96;/team/get_teams&#96;
+ **File**: &#96;app/routes/team_routes.py&#96;
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;python
+ @bp.route('/team/get_teams')
+ def get_teams():
+     try:
+         team_service = get_team_service()
+         teams = team_service.get_all_teams(
+             league_name=None,
+             season=None
+         )
+         return jsonify(teams)
+         
+     except Exception as e:
+         print(f"Error in get_teams: {str(e)}")
+         return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### **Team Service Method** ✅
+ **File**: &#96;app/services/team_service.py&#96;
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;python
+ def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):
+     """Returns all teams for a given league and season"""
+     print(f"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}")
+     return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## Expected Behavior
+ 
+ ### 1. **Page Load**:
+ - ✅ **Team dropdown populated** with all teams from database
+ - ✅ **Season buttons populated** by CentralizedButtonManager
+ - ✅ **Week buttons populated** by CentralizedButtonManager (when team selected)
+ 
+ ### 2. **User Interaction**:
+ - ✅ **Team selection** triggers state change and content rendering
+ - ✅ **Season selection** works with selected team
+ - ✅ **Week selection** works with selected team and season
+ 
+ ### 3. **Error Handling**:
+ - ✅ **Network errors** show "Fehler beim Laden der Teams" in dropdown
+ - ✅ **Invalid data** shows warning in console
+ - ✅ **Missing element** shows warning in console
+ 
+ ## Debugging Output
+ 
+ The system now provides clear logging:
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 🏢 Populating team dropdown...
+ 📊 Received teams data: ['Team A', 'Team B', 'Team C', ...]
+ ✅ Populated team dropdown with 15 teams
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## Files Modified
+ 
+ - &#96;app/static/js/team-stats-app.js&#96; - Added team dropdown population logic
+ 
+ ## Benefits
+ 
+ ### 1. **Complete Team Stats Functionality**:
+ - Team dropdown now populated with all available teams
+ - Users can select any team from the database
+ - Full integration with existing state management
+ 
+ ### 2. **Robust Error Handling**:
+ - Graceful handling of network errors
+ - Clear error messages for users
+ - Comprehensive logging for debugging
+ 
+ ### 3. **Consistent Architecture**:
+ - Uses existing API endpoints
+ - Follows established patterns
+ - Integrates seamlessly with CentralizedButtonManager
+ 
+ The team stats page now has full functionality with a populated team dropdown!
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

## Summary of Team Dropdown Fix ✅

I've successfully fixed the team stats page! Here's what was wrong and how I fixed it:

### **The Problem:**
- The team stats page uses a `<select>` dropdown for team selection
- Our `CentralizedButtonManager` only handles button groups (season, league, week)
- No logic existed to populate the team dropdown with data from the backend

### **The Solution:**

1. **Added Team Dropdown Population Method** 🏢
   - Created `populateTeamDropdown()` method in `TeamStatsApp`
   - Fetches teams from `/team/get_teams` API endpoint
   - Populates the dropdown with all available teams
   - Includes proper error handling

2. **Integrated into Initialization** 🔄
   - Added call to `populateTeamDropdown()` after button manager initialization
   - Ensures team dropdown is populated when page loads

3. **Used Existing Backend** ✅
   - Leveraged existing `/team/get_teams` endpoint
   - No backend changes needed
   - Follows established patterns

### **Expected Behavior Now:**
- ✅ **Team dropdown populated** with all teams from database
- ✅ **Season buttons work** with selected team
- ✅ **Week buttons work** with selected team and season
- ✅ **Content blocks render** based on selections
- ✅ **Error handling** for network issues

The team stats page should now have a fully functional team dropdown with all available teams!

---

_**Agent (2025-10-26 19:23:56Z)**_

I can see the issue! There are multiple 500 Internal Server Errors occurring when the team stats page tries to fetch data from several endpoints:

1. `/team/get_team_history` - 500 error
2. `/team/get_clutch_analysis` - 500 error  
3. `/team/get_consistency_metrics` - 500 error

The team dropdown is working fine (it successfully populated with 25 teams), but the backend API endpoints are failing. Let me investigate the backend routes to see what's causing these errors.

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_clutch_performance(self, team_name: str, league_name: str, season: str, clutch_threshold: int = 10) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Analyze clutch performance - games decided by close margins\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            team_name: Name of the team\r\n            league_name: Name of the league\r\n            season: Season identifier (can be None for all seasons)\r\n            clutch_threshold: Point margin threshold for clutch games (default: 10)\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            Dictionary with opponent clutch data: {\"opponent_name\": {\"wins\": X, \"losses\": Y}, ...}\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get team matches - if season is None, get all seasons\r\n            if season:\r\n                team_matches = self.server.get_matches(team=team_name, season=season)\r\n            else:\r\n                team_matches = self.server.get_matches(team=team_name)\r\n            \r\n            if team_matches.empty:\r\n                return {\"error\": \"No team data found\"}\r\n            \r\n            # Calculate margin for each match\r\n            team_matches['margin'] = team_matches[Columns.score] - team_matches['opponent_score']\r\n            team_matches['abs_margin'] = abs(team_matches['margin'])\r\n            \r\n            # Filter for clutch games (margin \u003c threshold)\r\n            clutch_games = team_matches[team_matches['abs_margin'] \u003c clutch_threshold].copy()\r\n            \r\n            # Calculate totals\r\n            total_games = len(team_matches)\r\n            total_clutch_games = len(clutch_games)\r\n            total_clutch_wins = len(clutch_games[clutch_games['margin'] \u003e 0])\r\n            total_clutch_losses = len(clutch_games[clutch_games['margin'] \u003c 0])\r\n            \r\n            # Calculate opponent-specific clutch performance using groupby\r\n            opponent_clutch = {}",
        "range": {

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    def get_team_analysis(self, league: str, season: str, team: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Get detailed team analysis including individual player performance and win percentages\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Get all player data for the team in the specified season and league\n            # EXCLUDE team totals - only get individual player records\n            player_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}  # Individual players only\n            }\n            \n            player_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=player_filters)\n            \n            if not player_data.empty:\n                # Filter out team totals - only keep individual player records\n                # Team totals typically have \"Team Total\" or similar in the Player column\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'Team Total']\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'team_total']\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'TEAM TOTAL']\n                \n                # Also filter out any records where Player ID is NaN (these are usually team totals)\n                player_data = player_data.dropna(subset=[Columns.player_id])\n            \n            if player_data.empty:\n                return {\n                    'error': f'No individual player data found for team {team} in {league} {season}',\n                    'performance_data': [],\n                    'win_percentage_data': [],\n                    'weeks': [],\n                    'players': []\n                }\n            \n            # Get unique weeks and players\n            weeks = sorted(player_data[Columns.week].unique())",

        "originalContents": "\n\n    def get_team_analysis(self, league: str, season: str, team: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Get detailed team analysis including individual player performance and win percentages\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Get all player data for the team in the specified season and league\n            # EXCLUDE team totals - only get individual player records\n            player_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}  # Individual players only\n            }\n            \n            player_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=player_filters)\n            \n            if not player_data.empty:\n                # Filter out team totals - only keep individual player records\n                # Team totals typically have \"Team Total\" or similar in the Player column\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'Team Total']\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'team_total']\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'TEAM TOTAL']\n                \n                # Also filter out any records where Player ID is NaN (these are usually team totals)\n                player_data = player_data.dropna(subset=[Columns.player_id])\n            \n            if player_data.empty:\n                return {\n                    'error': f'No individual player data found for team {team} in {league} {season}',\n                    'performance_data': [],\n                    'win_percentage_data': [],\n                    'weeks': [],\n                    'players': []\n                }\n            \n            # Get unique weeks and players\n            weeks = sorted(player_data[Columns.week].unique())",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate weekly performances\r\n        weekly_performances = {}\r\n        for week in weeks:\r\n            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r\n            \r\n            # Get player scores for this week\r\n            player_scores = {\r\n                p.player_name: p.score\r\n                for p in week_players\r\n            }\r\n           \r\n            weekly_performances[week] = TeamWeekPerformance(\r\n                team_id=team,\r\n                team_name=team,\r\n                week=week,\r\n                total_score=sum(p.score for p in week_players),\r\n                points=sum(p.points for p in week_players),\r\n                number_of_games=len([p.score for p in week_players]),\r\n                player_scores=player_scores\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        all_scores = [p.score for p in raw_team_data.players]",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r"

            "text": "        # Get raw team data\r"

            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "        for week in weeks:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "            # Get player scores for this week\r"

            "lineNumber": 33,

        "originalContents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate weekly performances\r\n        weekly_performances = {}\r\n        for week in weeks:\r\n            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r\n            \r\n            # Get player scores for this week\r\n            player_scores = {\r\n                p.player_name: p.score\r\n                for p in week_players\r\n            }\r\n           \r\n            weekly_performances[week] = TeamWeekPerformance(\r\n                team_id=team,\r\n                team_name=team,\r\n                week=week,\r\n                total_score=sum(p.score for p in week_players),\r\n                points=sum(p.points for p in week_players),\r\n                number_of_games=len([p.score for p in week_players]),\r\n                player_scores=player_scores\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        all_scores = [p.score for p in raw_team_data.players]",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "from data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "from data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate weekly performances\r\n        weekly_performances = {}\r\n        for week in weeks:\r\n            week_players = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.week == week]\r\n            \r\n            # Get player scores for this week\r\n            player_scores = {\r\n                p.player_name: p.score\r\n                for p in week_players\r\n            }\r\n           \r\n            weekly_performances[week] = TeamWeekPerformance(\r\n                team_id=team,\r\n                team_name=team,\r\n                week=week,\r\n                total_score=sum(p.score for p in week_players),\r\n                points=sum(p.points for p in week_players),\r\n                number_of_games=len([p.score for p in week_players]),\r\n                player_scores=player_scores\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        all_scores = [p.score for p in raw_team_data.players]",

        "originalContents": "from typing import Dict, List, Optional, Any\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import (\r\n    LeagueStatistics, TeamStatistics, PlayerStatistics,\r\n    LeagueWeekSummary, LeagueSeasonSummary,\r\n    TeamWeekPerformance, TeamSeasonSummary,\r\n    PlayerWeekPerformance, PlayerSeasonSummary\r\n)\r\nfrom data_access.models.raw_data_models import RawTeamData, RawLeagueData, RawPlayerData\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\r\n\r\nclass StatisticsService:\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics for a specific team and season.\"\"\"\r\n        # Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        #     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",

        "originalContents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class StatisticsService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_statistics(self, league: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[LeagueStatistics]:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        season_summary = PlayerSeasonSummary(\r\n            total_score=player_data[Columns.score].sum(),\r\n            total_points=player_data[Columns.points].sum(),\r\n            average_score=player_data[Columns.score].mean(),\r\n            games_played=len(player_data),\r\n            best_score=player_data[Columns.score].max(),\r\n            worst_score=player_data[Columns.score].min()\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate team contribution\r\n        team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            filters={\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': player_data[Columns.team_name].iloc[0], 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n        team_contribution = (season_summary.total_score / team_data[Columns.score].sum()) * 100\r\n        \r\n        return PlayerStatistics(\r\n            name=player,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            weekly_performances=weekly_performances,\r\n            season_summary=season_summary,\r\n            team_contribution=team_contribution\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def get_team_series_data(self, team_name: str, season: str, league: str, \r\n                            x_field: str, y_field: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team series data using the new SeriesData class\"\"\"\r\n        raw_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_team_series_data(team_name, season, league)\r\n        \r\n        series_data = calculate_series_data_from_dataframe(\r\n            df=pd.DataFrame(raw_data),\r\n            x_field=x_field,\r\n            y_field=y_field,\r\n            name=f\"{team_name} {y_field}\",\r\n            label_x=x_field,\r\n            label_y=y_field,\r\n            query_params={\"team\": team_name, \"season\": season, \"league\": league}\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        return series_data.to_dict()",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate season summary\r\n        season_summary = PlayerSeasonSummary(\r\n            total_score=player_data[Columns.score].sum(),\r\n            total_points=player_data[Columns.points].sum(),\r\n            average_score=player_data[Columns.score].mean(),\r\n            games_played=len(player_data),\r\n            best_score=player_data[Columns.score].max(),\r\n            worst_score=player_data[Columns.score].min()\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # Calculate team contribution\r\n        team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            filters={\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': player_data[Columns.team_name].iloc[0], 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n        team_contribution = (season_summary.total_score / team_data[Columns.score].sum()) * 100\r\n        \r\n        return PlayerStatistics(\r\n            name=player,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            weekly_performances=weekly_performances,\r\n            season_summary=season_summary,\r\n            team_contribution=team_contribution\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    def get_team_series_data(self, team_name: str, season: str, league: str, \r\n                            x_field: str, y_field: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team series data using the new SeriesData class\"\"\"\r\n        raw_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_team_series_data(team_name, season, league)\r\n        \r\n        series_data = calculate_series_data_from_dataframe(\r\n            df=pd.DataFrame(raw_data),\r\n            x_field=x_field,\r\n            y_field=y_field,\r\n            name=f\"{team_name} {y_field}\",\r\n            label_x=x_field,\r\n            label_y=y_field,\r\n            query_params={\"team\": team_name, \"season\": season, \"league\": league}\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        return series_data.to_dict()",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    def get_team_analysis(self, league: str, season: str, team: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Get detailed team analysis including individual player performance and win percentages\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Get all player data for the team in the specified season and league\n            # EXCLUDE team totals - only get individual player records\n            player_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}  # Individual players only\n            }\n            \n            player_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=player_filters)\n            \n            if not player_data.empty:\n                # Filter out team totals - only keep individual player records\n                # Team totals typically have \"Team Total\" or similar in the Player column\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'Team Total']\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'team_total']\n                player_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.player_name] != 'TEAM TOTAL']\n                \n                # Also filter out any records where Player ID is NaN (these are usually team totals)\n                player_data = player_data.dropna(subset=[Columns.player_id])\n            \n            if player_data.empty:\n                return {\n                    'error': f'No individual player data found for team {team} in {league} {season}',\n                    'performance_data': [],\n                    'win_percentage_data': [],\n                    'weeks': [],\n                    'players': []\n                }\n            \n            # Get unique weeks and players\n            weeks = sorted(player_data[Columns.week].unique())",

Get raw team data\r\n        raw_team_data = self.server.data_adapter.get_raw_team_data(team, season)\r\n        if not raw_team_data:\r\n            return None\r\n            \r\n        # Get all weeks for this team\r\n        weeks = sorted({p.week for p in raw_team_data.players})\r\n        \r\n        #         "contents": "class StatisticsService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team: str, season: str) -\u003e Optional[TeamStatistics]:\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n        season_summary = TeamSeasonSummary(\r\n            total_score=sum(all_scores),\r\n            total_points=sum(p.points for p in raw_team_data.players),\r\n            average_score=sum(all_scores) / len(all_scores) if all_scores else 0,\r\n            games_played=len(raw_team_data.players),\r\n            best_score=max(all_scores) if all_scores else 0,\r\n            worst_score=min(all_scores) if all_scores else 0\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # Get player contributions\r\n        player_contributions = {}\r\n        for player_name in {p.player_name for p in raw_team_data.players}:\r\n            player_data = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.player_name == player_name]\r\n            player_contributions[player_name] = {\r\n                'total_score': sum(p.score for p in player_data),\r\n                'average_score': sum(p.score for p in player_data) / len(player_data),\r\n                'games_played': len(player_data)\r\n            }\r\n        \r\n        return TeamStatistics(\r\n            team_name=team,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            weekly_performances=weekly_performances,\r\n            season_summary=season_summary,\r\n            player_contributions=player_contributions\r\n        )",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        season_summary = TeamSeasonSummary(\r\n            total_score=sum(all_scores),\r\n            total_points=sum(p.points for p in raw_team_data.players),\r\n            average_score=sum(all_scores) / len(all_scores) if all_scores else 0,\r\n            games_played=len(raw_team_data.players),\r\n            best_score=max(all_scores) if all_scores else 0,\r\n            worst_score=min(all_scores) if all_scores else 0\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # Get player contributions\r\n        player_contributions = {}\r\n        for player_name in {p.player_name for p in raw_team_data.players}:\r\n            player_data = [p for p in raw_team_data.players if p.player_name == player_name]\r\n            player_contributions[player_name] = {\r\n                'total_score': sum(p.score for p in player_data),\r\n                'average_score': sum(p.score for p in player_data) / len(player_data),\r\n                'games_played': len(player_data)\r\n            }\r\n        \r\n        return TeamStatistics(\r\n            team_name=team,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            weekly_performances=weekly_performances,\r\n            season_summary=season_summary,\r\n            player_contributions=player_contributions\r\n        )",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    def get_available_weeks(self, team_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible weeks for a given team and season\"\"\"\r\n        # Handle \"all seasons\" case (empty string, None, or \"All\")\r\n        if not season or season == \"\" or season == \"All\":\r\n            # Get all seasons for this team\r\n            seasons = self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)\r\n            if not seasons:\r\n                return []\r\n            \r\n            # Get all weeks across all seasons\r\n            all_weeks = set()\r\n            for s in seasons:\r\n                # Get the league for this season\r\n                leagues = self.server.get_leagues(team_name=team_name, season=s)\r\n                if leagues and len(leagues) \u003e 0:\r\n                    league = leagues[0]  # Take the first league\r\n                    # Call get_weeks with correct parameters (season, league)\r\n                    weeks = self.server.get_weeks(league_name=league, season=s)\r\n                    if weeks:\r\n                        all_weeks.update(weeks)\r\n            \r\n            return sorted(list(all_weeks))\r\n        else:\r\n            # Get the league for this specific season\r\n            leagues = self.server.get_leagues(team_name=team_name, season=season)\r\n            if leagues and len(leagues) \u003e 0:\r\n                league = leagues[0]  # Take the first league\r\n                return self.server.get_weeks(season=season, league=league)\r\n            else:\r\n                return []\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team_name: str, season: str) -\u003e TeamStatistics:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics\"\"\"\r\n        return self.stats_service.get_team_statistics(team_name, season)",

          {

            "text": "        \"\"\"Returns all possible weeks for a given team and season\"\"\"\r"

            "text": "        # Handle \"all seasons\" case (empty string, None, or \"All\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        if not season or season == \"\" or season == \"All\":\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 37,

            "lineNumber": 38,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            if not seasons:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "                return []\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "            # Get all weeks across all seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "                leagues = self.server.get_leagues(team_name=team_name, season=s)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "                if leagues and len(leagues) \u003e 0:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "                    # Call get_weeks with correct parameters (season, league)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "                    weeks = self.server.get_weeks(league_name=league, season=s)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    def get_team_history(self, team_name: str=None) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "        \"\"\"Returns the history of a team for a given season\"\"\""

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    def get_available_weeks(self, team_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible weeks for a given team and season\"\"\"\r\n        # Handle \"all seasons\" case (empty string, None, or \"All\")\r\n        if not season or season == \"\" or season == \"All\":\r\n            # Get all seasons for this team\r\n            seasons = self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)\r\n            if not seasons:\r\n                return []\r\n            \r\n            # Get all weeks across all seasons\r\n            all_weeks = set()\r\n            for s in seasons:\r\n                # Get the league for this season\r\n                leagues = self.server.get_leagues(team_name=team_name, season=s)\r\n                if leagues and len(leagues) \u003e 0:\r\n                    league = leagues[0]  # Take the first league\r\n                    # Call get_weeks with correct parameters (season, league)\r\n                    weeks = self.server.get_weeks(league_name=league, season=s)\r\n                    if weeks:\r\n                        all_weeks.update(weeks)\r\n            \r\n            return sorted(list(all_weeks))\r\n        else:\r\n            # Get the league for this specific season\r\n            leagues = self.server.get_leagues(team_name=team_name, season=season)\r\n            if leagues and len(leagues) \u003e 0:\r\n                league = leagues[0]  # Take the first league\r\n                return self.server.get_weeks(season=season, league=league)\r\n            else:\r\n                return []\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_statistics(self, team_name: str, season: str) -\u003e TeamStatistics:\r\n        \"\"\"Get comprehensive team statistics\"\"\"\r\n        return self.stats_service.get_team_statistics(team_name, season)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",

        "originalContents": "from business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter import DataAdapter\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport pandas as pd\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\nfrom business_logic.server import Server\r\nfrom flask import jsonify, Response\r\nfrom business_logic.league import levels\r\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\r\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import TeamStatistics\r\n\r\nclass TeamService:\r\n    # fetches dataframes from server\r\n    # converts dataframes to dicts\r\n    # jsonifies dicts   \r\n    # forwards JSON dict to app routes\r\n    def __init__(self, database: str = None):\r\n        self.database = database\r\n        self.server = Server(database=database)\r\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\r\n\r\n    def get_all_teams(self, league_name: str=None, season: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all teams for a given league and season\"\"\"\r\n        print(f\"Team Service: Get All Teams - Received request with: league_name={league_name}, season={season}\")\r\n        return self.server.get_teams_in_league_season(league_name=league_name, season=season, debug_output=True)\r\n        \r\n    def get_available_seasons(self, team_name: str=None):\r\n        \"\"\"Returns all possible seasons\"\"\"\r\n        return self.server.get_seasons(team_name=team_name)",
