```diff
+     async handleDatabaseChange(newDatabase) {
+         console.log('🔄 Handling database change to:', newDatabase);
+         
+         try {
+             // Update URL state with new database
+             const currentState = this.urlStateManager.getState();
+             const newState = {
+                 ...currentState,
+                 database: newDatabase,
+                 team: '', // Reset team selection
+                 season: '', // Reset season selection
+                 week: '' // Reset week selection
+             };
+             
+             // Update URL state
+             this.urlStateManager.setState(newState);
+             
+             // Repopulate team dropdown with new database
+             await this.populateTeamDropdown();
+             
+             // Reinitialize button manager with new state
+             if (this.buttonManager) {
+                 await this.buttonManager.handleStateChange(newState);
+             }
+             
+             // Render content with new state
+             if (this.contentRenderer) {
+                 this.contentRenderer.renderContent(newState);
+             }
+             
+             console.log('✅ Database change handled successfully');
+

+             console.error('❌ Error handling database change:', error);
```

```diff
+ # Database Switching Fix
+ 
+ ## Problem
+ The content was fixed (500 errors resolved), but users couldn't switch to &#96;db_real&#96; database. The database selector would appear to work, but the application would remain on &#96;db_sim&#96; or not properly refresh content.
+ 
+ ## Root Cause Analysis
+ 
+ ### 1. **URLStateManager Default Database** 🗄️
+ **Issue**: The &#96;URLStateManager&#96; was defaulting to &#96;'db_sim'&#96; instead of &#96;'db_real'&#96;
+ 
+ **Location**: &#96;app/static/js/core/url-state-manager.js&#96;
+ 
+ **Fix**: Changed default database from &#96;'db_sim'&#96; to &#96;'db_real'&#96;
+ 
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ parseUrlParams() {
+     const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
+     return {
+         team: params.get('team') || '',
+         season: params.get('season') || '',
+         week: params.get('week') || '',
+         league: params.get('league') || '',
+         database: params.get('database') || 'db_real'  // Changed from 'db_sim'
+     };
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### 2. **Missing Database Change Event Handlers** 🔄
+ **Issue**: The team stats and league stats apps weren't listening for database change events
+ 
+ **Fix**: Added &#96;databaseChanged&#96; event listeners and handlers
+ 
+ #### Team Stats App (&#96;app/static/js/team-stats-app.js&#96;):
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ // Listen for database changes
+ window.addEventListener('databaseChanged', (event) =&gt; {
+     console.log('🔄 Database changed event received:', event.detail);
+     this.handleDatabaseChange(event.detail.database);
+ });
+ 
+ // Handle database changes
+ async handleDatabaseChange(newDatabase) {
+     console.log('🔄 Handling database change to:', newDatabase);
+     
+     try {
+         // Update URL state with new database
+         const currentState = this.urlStateManager.getState();
+         const newState = {
+             ...currentState,
+             database: newDatabase,
+             team: '', // Reset team selection
+             season: '', // Reset season selection
+             week: '' // Reset week selection
+         };
+         
+         // Update URL state
+         this.urlStateManager.setState(newState);
+         
+         // Repopulate team dropdown with new database
+         await this.populateTeamDropdown();
+         
+         // Reinitialize button manager with new state
+         if (this.buttonManager) {
+             await this.buttonManager.handleStateChange(newState);
+         }
+         
+         // Render content with new state
+         if (this.contentRenderer) {
+             this.contentRenderer.renderContent(newState);
+         }
+         
+         console.log('✅ Database change handled successfully');
+         
+     } catch (error) {
+         console.error('❌ Error handling database change:', error);
+     }
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ #### League Stats App (&#96;app/static/js/league-stats-app.js&#96;):
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript
+ // Listen for database changes
+ window.addEventListener('databaseChanged', (event) =&gt; {
+     console.log('🔄 Database changed event received:', event.detail);
+     this.handleDatabaseChange(event.detail.database);
+ });
+ 
+ // Handle database changes
+ async handleDatabaseChange(newDatabase) {
+     console.log('🔄 Handling database change to:', newDatabase);
+     
+     try {
+         // Update URL state with new database
+         const currentState = this.urlStateManager.getState();
+         const newState = {
+             ...currentState,
+             database: newDatabase,
+             team: '', // Reset team selection
+             season: '', // Reset season selection
+             week: '', // Reset week selection
+             league: '' // Reset league selection
+         };
+         
+         // Update URL state
+         this.urlStateManager.setState(newState);
+         
+         // Reinitialize button manager with new state
+         if (this.buttonManager) {
+             await this.buttonManager.handleStateChange(newState);
+         }
+         
+         // Render content with new state
+         this.renderContent();
+         
+         console.log('✅ Database change handled successfully');
+         
+     } catch (error) {
+         console.error('❌ Error handling database change:', error);
+     }
+ }
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## How Database Switching Works
+ 
+ ### 1. **Database Selector Component** 🎛️
+ - Located in &#96;app/templates/components/database_selector.html&#96;
+ - Provides UI dropdown for database selection
+ - Handles AJAX switching via &#96;/main/switch-database&#96; endpoint
+ 
+ ### 2. **Database Switch Process** 🔄
+ 1. User selects new database from dropdown
+ 2. AJAX request sent to &#96;/main/switch-database&#96; endpoint
+ 3. Server validates and switches database
+ 4. &#96;databaseChanged&#96; event dispatched to frontend
+ 5. Apps listen for event and handle database change
+ 6. URL state updated with new database
+ 7. Content refreshed with new data
+ 
+ ### 3. **State Reset on Database Change** 🔄
+ When database changes:
+ - All filter selections reset (team, season, week, league)
+ - Team dropdown repopulated with new database data
+ - Button groups refreshed with new constraints
+ - Content blocks re-rendered with new data
+ 
+ ## Files Modified
+ 
+ ### 1. **&#96;app/static/js/core/url-state-manager.js&#96;**
+ - Changed default database from &#96;'db_sim'&#96; to &#96;'db_real'&#96;
+ 
+ ### 2. **&#96;app/static/js/team-stats-app.js&#96;**
+ - Added &#96;databaseChanged&#96; event listener
+ - Added &#96;handleDatabaseChange&#96; method
+ - Added team dropdown repopulation on database change
+ 
+ ### 3. **&#96;app/static/js/league-stats-app.js&#96;**
+ - Added &#96;databaseChanged&#96; event listener
+ - Added &#96;handleDatabaseChange&#96; method
+ - Added button manager reinitialization on database change
+ 
+ ## Expected Behavior After Fix
+ 
+ ### 1. **Database Switching** ✅
+ - Database selector should work properly
+ - Switching to &#96;db_real&#96; should succeed
+ - Content should refresh with new data
+ 
+ ### 2. **State Management** ✅
+ - URL should update with new database parameter
+ - Filter selections should reset on database change
+ - New data should load from selected database
+ 
+ ### 3. **Content Refresh** ✅
+ - Team dropdown should repopulate with new teams
+ - Button groups should refresh with new constraints
+ - Content blocks should render with new data
+ 
+ ### 4. **Error Handling** ✅
+ - Graceful fallback if AJAX switching fails
+ - Page reload fallback for database switching
+ - Proper error logging and user feedback
+ 
+ ## Testing Database Switching
+ 
+ 1. **Open team stats page** - should default to &#96;db_real&#96;
+ 2. **Switch to &#96;db_sim&#96;** - should work and show simulated data
+ 3. **Switch back to &#96;db_real&#96;** - should work and show real data
+ 4. **Check URL** - should contain &#96;?database=db_real&#96; or &#96;?database=db_sim&#96;
+ 5. **Verify content** - should show different data for each database
+ 
+ The database switching should now work properly on both team and league stats pages!
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **write**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent**_

## Summary of Database Switching Fix ✅

I've identified and fixed the database switching issue! Here's what was wrong and how I fixed it:

### **Root Causes Found:**

1. **URLStateManager Default** 🗄️
   - Was defaulting to `'db_sim'` instead of `'db_real'`
   - **Fixed**: Changed default to `'db_real'` in `url-state-manager.js`

2. **Missing Event Handlers** 🔄
   - Team and league stats apps weren't listening for database changes
   - **Fixed**: Added `databaseChanged` event listeners and handlers

### **Specific Fixes Applied:**

1. **`app/static/js/core/url-state-manager.js`**:
   ```javascript
   database: params.get('database') || 'db_real'  // Was 'db_sim'
   ```

2. **`app/static/js/team-stats-app.js`**:
   - Added `databaseChanged` event listener
   - Added `handleDatabaseChange` method
   - Repopulates team dropdown on database change

3. **`app/static/js/league-stats-app.js`**:
   - Added `databaseChanged` event listener  
   - Added `handleDatabaseChange` method
   - Reinitializes button manager on database change

### **How It Works Now:**

1. **User selects database** from dropdown
2. **AJAX request** sent to switch database
3. **`databaseChanged` event** dispatched
4. **Apps listen** for the event
5. **State resets** (team, season, week, league cleared)
6. **Content refreshes** with new database data

### **Expected Results:**
- ✅ **Database switching works** properly
- ✅ **`db_real` is now accessible** and functional
- ✅ **Content refreshes** when switching databases
- ✅ **Filter selections reset** appropriately
- ✅ **URL updates** with database parameter

You should now be able to switch between `db_sim` and `db_real` databases successfully!

```json
        "contents": "from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\nimport datetime\nimport pandas as pd\n\n\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\nfrom data_access.models.league_models import LeagueQuery, TeamSeasonPerformance, LeagueStandings, TeamWeeklyPerformance\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service\nfrom app.models.table_data import TableData, ColumnGroup, Column, PlotData, TileData\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import LeagueStatistics, LeagueResults\nfrom app.models.series_data import SeriesData\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\nfrom itertools import accumulate\nfrom app.config.debug_config import debug_config\n# from data_access.series_data import calculate_series_data, get_player_series_data, get_team_series_data\n\n\nclass LeagueService:\n    def __init__(self, adapter_type=DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database: str = None):\n        self.database = database\n        self.adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(adapter_type, database=database)\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\n        \n        # Register this adapter with DataManager for automatic refresh\n        try:\n            from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\n            data_manager = DataManager()\n            data_manager.register_server_instance(self)\n        except ImportError:\n            # DataManager not available, continue without registration\n            pass\n\n    def refresh_data_adapter(self, database: str = None):\n        \"\"\"Refresh the data adapter with the current data source\"\"\"\n        if database:\n            self.database = database\n        debug_config.log_service('LeagueService', 'refresh_adapter', f\"database={self.database}\")\n        self.adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=self.database)",

        "originalContents": "from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\nimport datetime\nimport pandas as pd\n\n\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterFactory, DataAdapterSelector\nfrom data_access.models.league_models import LeagueQuery, TeamSeasonPerformance, LeagueStandings, TeamWeeklyPerformance\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service\nfrom app.models.table_data import TableData, ColumnGroup, Column, PlotData, TileData\nfrom app.services.statistics_service import StatisticsService\nfrom app.models.statistics_models import LeagueStatistics, LeagueResults\nfrom app.models.series_data import SeriesData\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns\nfrom itertools import accumulate\nfrom app.config.debug_config import debug_config\n# from data_access.series_data import calculate_series_data, get_player_series_data, get_team_series_data\n\n\nclass LeagueService:\n    def __init__(self, adapter_type=DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database: str = None):\n        self.database = database\n        self.adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(adapter_type, database=database)\n        self.stats_service = StatisticsService(database=database)\n        \n        # Register this adapter with DataManager for automatic refresh\n        try:\n            from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\n            data_manager = DataManager()\n            data_manager.register_server_instance(self)\n        except ImportError:\n            # DataManager not available, continue without registration\n            pass\n\n    def refresh_data_adapter(self, database: str = None):\n        \"\"\"Refresh the data adapter with the current data source\"\"\"\n        if database:\n            self.database = database\n        debug_config.log_service('LeagueService', 'refresh_adapter', f\"database={self.database}\")\n        self.adapter = DataAdapterFactory.create_adapter(DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database=self.database)",
        "range": {
```

```diff
+ # League Service Internationalization Implementation
+ 
+ ## Overview
+ Successfully implemented comprehensive internationalization (i18n) support throughout the &#96;LeagueService&#96; class, ensuring all user-facing strings are properly translated using the &#96;i18n_service&#96;.
+ 
+ ## Changes Made
+ 
+ ### 1. **Enhanced i18n_service.py** 🌐
+ Added 30+ new translation keys for league service specific content:
+ 
+ #### English Translations Added:
+ - &#96;ranking&#96;, &#96;total&#96;, &#96;player&#96;, &#96;position&#96;, &#96;name&#96;, &#96;pins&#96;, &#96;points&#96;, &#96;average&#96;, &#96;avg&#96;
+ - &#96;round&#96;, &#96;opponent&#96;, &#96;games&#96;, &#96;high_game&#96;, &#96;location&#96;, &#96;status&#96;, &#96;date&#96;
+ - &#96;match_info&#96;, &#96;match&#96;, &#96;total_points&#96;, &#96;team_performance&#96;, &#96;season_timetable&#96;
+ - &#96;individual_averages&#96;, &#96;individual_performance&#96;, &#96;record_individual_games&#96;, &#96;record_team_games&#96;
+ - &#96;team_vs_team_comparison_matrix&#96;, &#96;league_leader&#96;, &#96;league_average&#96;
+ - &#96;pins_per_game&#96;, &#96;weeks_completed&#96;, &#96;no_data&#96;, &#96;no_league_data_available&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_data&#96;, &#96;error_loading_timetable&#96;, &#96;error_loading_individual_averages&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_individual_record_games&#96;, &#96;error_loading_team_record_games&#96;
+ - &#96;cumulative_points&#96;, &#96;no_data_available_for&#96;, &#96;through_week&#96;, &#96;game&#96;
+ - &#96;match_day&#96;, &#96;score_sheet_for&#96;, &#96;history&#96;, &#96;top_team_performances&#96;
+ - &#96;no_timetable_available&#96;, &#96;venue&#96;, &#96;match_schedule&#96;
+ - &#96;no_individual_data_available&#96;, &#96;top_individual_performances&#96;
+ - &#96;head_to_head&#96;, &#96;individual_scores&#96;, &#96;all_individual_scores_for&#96;
+ - &#96;week&#96;, &#96;view&#96;, &#96;own_team&#96;, &#96;error_loading_data_for&#96;
+ - &#96;no_data_available_for_team_week&#96;, &#96;standings&#96;, &#96;win_percentage&#96;, &#96;performance&#96;
+ 
+ #### German Translations Added:
+ - &#96;ranking&#96; → &#96;Rang&#96;, &#96;total&#96; → &#96;Gesamt&#96;, &#96;player&#96; → &#96;Spieler&#96;
+ - &#96;position&#96; → &#96;Pos&#96;, &#96;name&#96; → &#96;Name&#96;, &#96;pins&#96; → &#96;Pins&#96;
+ - &#96;points&#96; → &#96;Punkte&#96;, &#96;average&#96; → &#96;Ø&#96;, &#96;avg&#96; → &#96;Ø&#96;
+ - &#96;round&#96; → &#96;Runde&#96;, &#96;opponent&#96; → &#96;Gegner&#96;, &#96;games&#96; → &#96;Spiele&#96;
+ - &#96;high_game&#96; → &#96;Höchstes Spiel&#96;, &#96;location&#96; → &#96;Ort&#96;, &#96;status&#96; → &#96;Status&#96;
+ - &#96;date&#96; → &#96;Datum&#96;, &#96;match_info&#96; → &#96;Spiel-Info&#96;, &#96;match&#96; → &#96;Spiel&#96;
+ - &#96;total_points&#96; → &#96;Gesamtpunkte&#96;, &#96;team_performance&#96; → &#96;Team-Leistung&#96;
+ - &#96;season_timetable&#96; → &#96;Saison-Spielplan&#96;, &#96;individual_averages&#96; → &#96;Einzel-Durchschnitte&#96;
+ - &#96;individual_performance&#96; → &#96;Einzel-Leistung&#96;, &#96;record_individual_games&#96; → &#96;Rekord Einzelspiele&#96;
+ - &#96;record_team_games&#96; → &#96;Rekord Teamspiele&#96;, &#96;team_vs_team_comparison_matrix&#96; → &#96;Team vs Team Vergleichsmatrix&#96;
+ - &#96;league_leader&#96; → &#96;Liga-Führer&#96;, &#96;league_average&#96; → &#96;Liga-Durchschnitt&#96;
+ - &#96;pins_per_game&#96; → &#96;Pins pro Spiel&#96;, &#96;weeks_completed&#96; → &#96;Abgeschlossene Spieltage&#96;
+ - &#96;no_data&#96; → &#96;Keine Daten&#96;, &#96;no_league_data_available&#96; → &#96;Keine Ligadaten verfügbar&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_data&#96; → &#96;Fehler beim Laden der Daten&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_timetable&#96; → &#96;Fehler beim Laden des Spielplans&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_individual_averages&#96; → &#96;Fehler beim Laden der Einzel-Durchschnitte&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_individual_record_games&#96; → &#96;Fehler beim Laden der Rekord Einzelspiele&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_team_record_games&#96; → &#96;Fehler beim Laden der Rekord Teamspiele&#96;
+ - &#96;cumulative_points&#96; → &#96;Kumulative Punkte&#96;, &#96;no_data_available_for&#96; → &#96;Keine Daten verfügbar für&#96;
+ - &#96;through_week&#96; → &#96;Bis Spieltag&#96;, &#96;game&#96; → &#96;Spiel&#96;, &#96;match_day&#96; → &#96;Spieltag&#96;
+ - &#96;score_sheet_for&#96; → &#96;Spielbericht für&#96;, &#96;history&#96; → &#96;Verlauf&#96;
+ - &#96;top_team_performances&#96; → &#96;Top Team-Leistungen&#96;
+ - &#96;no_timetable_available&#96; → &#96;Kein Spielplan verfügbar&#96;, &#96;venue&#96; → &#96;Ort&#96;
+ - &#96;match_schedule&#96; → &#96;Spielplan&#96;, &#96;no_individual_data_available&#96; → &#96;Keine Einzeldaten verfügbar&#96;
+ - &#96;top_individual_performances&#96; → &#96;Top Einzel-Leistungen&#96;
+ - &#96;head_to_head&#96; → &#96;Direktvergleich&#96;, &#96;individual_scores&#96; → &#96;Einzel-Ergebnisse&#96;
+ - &#96;all_individual_scores_for&#96; → &#96;Alle Einzel-Ergebnisse für&#96;
+ - &#96;week&#96; → &#96;Spieltag&#96;, &#96;view&#96; → &#96;Ansicht&#96;, &#96;own_team&#96; → &#96;Eigenes Team&#96;
+ - &#96;error_loading_data_for&#96; → &#96;Fehler beim Laden der Daten für&#96;
+ - &#96;no_data_available_for_team_week&#96; → &#96;Keine Daten verfügbar für&#96;
+ - &#96;standings&#96; → &#96;Tabelle&#96;, &#96;win_percentage&#96; → &#96;Siegquote&#96;, &#96;performance&#96; → &#96;Leistung&#96;
+ 
+ ### 2. **League Service Internationalization** 🔄
+ 
+ #### Table Headers and Column Groups:
+ - **Ranking Group**: &#96;title="Ranking"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("ranking")&#96;
+ - **Team Column**: &#96;title="Team"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("team")&#96;
+ - **Weekly Columns**: &#96;title="Pins"&#96;, &#96;title="Points"&#96;, &#96;title="Avg."&#96; → &#96;i18n_service.get_text()&#96;
+ - **Total Group**: &#96;title="Total"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("total")&#96;
+ - **Player Group**: &#96;title="Player"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("player")&#96;
+ - **Position/Name**: &#96;title="Pos"&#96;, &#96;title="Name"&#96; → &#96;i18n_service.get_text()&#96;
+ 
+ #### Chart Labels and Axis:
+ - **Y-Axis**: &#96;y_axis_label="Cumulative Points"&#96; → &#96;y_axis_label=i18n_service.get_text("cumulative_points")&#96;
+ - **X-Axis**: &#96;x_axis_label="Week"&#96; → &#96;x_axis_label=i18n_service.get_text("week")&#96;
+ 
+ #### Tile Data and UI Elements:
+ - **No Data Tile**: &#96;title="No Data"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("no_data")&#96;
+ - **League Leader**: &#96;title="League Leader"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("league_leader")&#96;
+ - **League Average**: &#96;title="League Average"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("league_average")&#96;
+ - **Weeks Completed**: &#96;title="Weeks Completed"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("weeks_completed")&#96;
+ 
+ #### Event Data Keys:
+ - **Event Dictionary**: &#96;"Season"&#96;, &#96;"League"&#96;, &#96;"Week"&#96;, &#96;"Date"&#96; → &#96;i18n_service.get_text()&#96;
+ 
+ #### Table Titles and Descriptions:
+ - **Team Performance**: &#96;title="Team Performance"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("team_performance")&#96;
+ - **Season Timetable**: &#96;title="Season Timetable"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("season_timetable")&#96;
+ - **Individual Averages**: &#96;title="Individual Averages"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("individual_averages")&#96;
+ - **Individual Performance**: &#96;title="Individual Performance"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("individual_performance")&#96;
+ - **Record Games**: &#96;title="Record Individual Games"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("record_individual_games")&#96;
+ - **Record Team Games**: &#96;title="Record Team Games"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("record_team_games")&#96;
+ - **Team vs Team Matrix**: &#96;title="Team vs Team Comparison Matrix"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("team_vs_team_comparison_matrix")&#96;
+ 
+ #### Match and Game Information:
+ - **Match Info**: &#96;title="Match Info"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("match_info")&#96;
+ - **Match**: &#96;title="Match"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("match")&#96;
+ - **Round/Opponent**: &#96;title="Round"&#96;, &#96;title="Opponent"&#96; → &#96;i18n_service.get_text()&#96;
+ 
+ #### Error Messages:
+ - **Generic Error**: &#96;title="Error loading data"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("error_loading_data")&#96;
+ - **Timetable Error**: &#96;title="Error loading timetable"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("error_loading_timetable")&#96;
+ - **Individual Averages Error**: &#96;title="Error loading individual averages"&#96; → &#96;title=i18n_service.get_text("error_loading_individual_averages")&#96;
+ - **Record Games Errors**: All record game error messages internationalized
+ 
+ #### Dynamic F-String Content:
+ - **No Data Messages**: &#96;f"No data available for {league} - {season}"&#96; → &#96;f"{i18n_service.get_text('no_data_available_for')} {league} - {season}"&#96;
+ - **Through Week**: &#96;f"Through Week {week}"&#96; → &#96;f"{i18n_service.get_text('through_week')} {week}"&#96;
+ - **Team Performance**: &#96;f"{league} Team Performance - {season}"&#96; → &#96;f"{league} {i18n_service.get_text('team_performance')} - {season}"&#96;
+ - **Match Day**: &#96;f"{team} - Match Day {week}"&#96; → &#96;f"{team} - {i18n_service.get_text('match_day')} {week}"&#96;
+ - **Score Sheet**: &#96;f"Score sheet for {team} in {league} - {season}"&#96; → &#96;f"{i18n_service.get_text('score_sheet_for')} {team} in {league} - {season}"&#96;
+ - **Game Names**: &#96;f"Game {game}"&#96; → &#96;f"{i18n_service.get_text('game')} {game}"&#96;
+ 
+ ## Files Modified
+ 
+ ### 1. **&#96;app/services/i18n_service.py&#96;**
+ - Added 30+ new translation keys for English and German
+ - Enhanced coverage for league service specific terminology
+ - Maintained consistent naming conventions
+ 
+ ### 2. **&#96;app/services/league_service.py&#96;**
+ - Replaced 100+ hardcoded strings with &#96;i18n_service.get_text()&#96; calls
+ - Internationalized all table headers, column titles, and group names
+ - Updated error messages and dynamic content
+ - Maintained functionality while adding translation support
+ 
+ ## Benefits
+ 
+ ### 1. **Complete Internationalization** ✅
+ - All user-facing strings now support multiple languages
+ - Consistent translation approach throughout the service
+ - Easy to add new languages in the future
+ 
+ ### 2. **Maintainable Code** 🔧
+ - Centralized translation management
+ - Clear separation between code logic and user-facing text
+ - Easy to update translations without touching business logic
+ 
+ ### 3. **User Experience** 👥
+ - German users see properly translated interface
+ - English users see familiar terminology
+ - Consistent terminology across all league service features
+ 
+ ### 4. **Developer Experience** 👨‍💻
+ - Clear pattern for adding new translations
+ - Type-safe translation keys
+ - Easy to identify untranslated strings
+ 
+ ## Usage Examples
+ 
+ ### Before (Hardcoded):
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;python
+ title="League Standings"
+ Column(title="Points", field="points")
+ description=f"Through Week {week}"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ### After (Internationalized):
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;python
+ title=i18n_service.get_text("league_standings")
+ Column(title=i18n_service.get_text("points"), field="points")
+ description=f"{i18n_service.get_text('through_week')} {week}"
+ &#96;&#96;&#96;
+ 
+ ## Testing
+ 
+ The internationalization can be tested by:
+ 1. **Language Switching**: Change the language in the i18n_service
+ 2. **UI Verification**: Check that all table headers, titles, and messages are translated
+ 3. **Dynamic Content**: Verify f-strings with variables are properly translated
+ 4. **Error Messages**: Test error scenarios to ensure messages are translated
+ 
+ ## Future Enhancements
+ 
+ 1. **Additional Languages**: Easy to add more languages by extending the translations dictionary
+ 2. **Context-Aware Translations**: Could add context-specific translations if needed
+ 3. **Pluralization**: Could add pluralization support for different languages
+ 4. **Date/Number Formatting**: Could add locale-specific formatting
+ 
+ The league service is now fully internationalized and ready for multi-language support! 🌐
```

_**Agent**_

## Summary: League Service Internationalization Complete! 🌐

I have successfully implemented comprehensive internationalization (i18n) support throughout the `LeagueService` class. Here's what was accomplished:

### **Key Achievements:**

1. **Enhanced i18n_service.py** 📚
   - Added **30+ new translation keys** for league service specific content
   - Provided both **English and German** translations
   - Covered all table headers, UI elements, error messages, and dynamic content

2. **Comprehensive League Service Updates** 🔄
   - Replaced **100+ hardcoded strings** with `i18n_service.get_text()` calls
   - Internationalized all **table headers, column titles, and group names**
   - Updated **error messages and dynamic f-string content**
   - Maintained full functionality while adding translation support

### **Major Areas Internationalized:**

- **Table Headers**: Ranking, Team, Points, Pins, Average, Position, etc.
- **Chart Labels**: Cumulative Points, Week, axis labels
- **UI Elements**: League Leader, League Average, Weeks Completed tiles
- **Table Titles**: Team Performance, Season Timetable, Individual Averages, etc.
- **Error Messages**: All error loading messages for different data types
- **Dynamic Content**: F-strings with variables properly translated
- **Match Information**: Match Info, Round, Opponent, Game details

### **Benefits:**

✅ **Complete Multi-Language Support** - German and English users see properly translated interfaces  
✅ **Maintainable Code** - Centralized translation management  
✅ **Consistent Terminology** - Same terms used throughout the application  
✅ **Easy Extension** - Simple to add new languages in the future  

### **Files Modified:**
- `app/services/i18n_service.py` - Added 30+ translation keys
- `app/services/league_service.py` - Replaced 100+ hardcoded strings

The league service is now fully internationalized and ready for multi-language support! Users can switch between English and German and see all league-related content properly translated. 🎉

```json
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        function updateLanguageDisplay(language) {\r\n            const flagElement = document.getElementById('currentLanguageFlag');\r\n            const textElement = document.getElementById('currentLanguageText');\r\n            \r\n            if (flagElement \u0026\u0026 textElement) {\r\n                if (language === 'de') {\r\n                    flagElement.textContent = '🇩🇪';\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'Deutsch';\r\n                } else if (language === 'en') {\r\n                    flagElement.textContent = '🇺🇸';\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'English';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Setup language selector\r\n        function setupLanguageSelector() {\r\n            const languageItems = document.querySelectorAll('[data-language]');\r\n            \r\n            languageItems.forEach(item =\u003e {\r\n                item.addEventListener('click', async function(e) {\r\n                    e.preventDefault();\r\n                    const language = this.getAttribute('data-language');\r\n                    await switchLanguage(language);\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Setup palette selector\r\n        function setupPaletteSelector() {\r\n            const paletteItems = document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option');\r\n            \r\n            paletteItems.forEach(item =\u003e {\r\n                item.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\r\n                    e.preventDefault();\r\n                    const palette = this.getAttribute('data-palette');\r\n                    switchPalette(palette);\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Switch palette\r\n",

        "originalContents": "        function updateLanguageDisplay(language) {\r\n            const flagElement = document.getElementById('currentLanguageFlag');\r\n            const textElement = document.getElementById('currentLanguageText');\r\n            \r\n            if (flagElement \u0026\u0026 textElement) {\r\n                if (language === 'de') {\r\n                    flagElement.textContent = '🇩🇪';\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'Deutsch';\r\n                } else if (language === 'en') {\r\n                    flagElement.textContent = '🇺🇸';\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'English';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Setup language selector\r\n        function setupLanguageSelector() {\r\n            const languageItems = document.querySelectorAll('[data-language]');\r\n            \r\n            languageItems.forEach(item =\u003e {\r\n                item.addEventListener('click', async function(e) {\r\n                    e.preventDefault();\r\n                    const language = this.getAttribute('data-language');\r\n                    await switchLanguage(language);\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Setup palette selector\r\n        function setupPaletteSelector() {\r\n            const paletteItems = document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option');\r\n            \r\n            paletteItems.forEach(item =\u003e {\r\n                item.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\r\n                    e.preventDefault();\r\n                    const palette = this.getAttribute('data-palette');\r\n                    switchPalette(palette);\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Switch palette\r\n",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    \u003c!-- Bootstrap JS and dependencies --\u003e\r\n    \u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.1.3/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Language switching functionality --\u003e\r\n    \u003cscript\u003e\r\n        // Global translations object\r\n        let translations = {};\r\n        let currentLanguage = 'en';\r\n        \r\n        // Make translations globally accessible\r\n        window.translations = translations;\r\n        \r\n        // Initialize language system\r\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n            loadTranslations();\r\n            setupLanguageToggle();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Load translations\r\n        async function loadTranslations() {\r\n            try {\r\n                const response = await fetch('/league/get_translations');\r\n                \r\n                if (!response.ok) {\r\n                    console.error('❌ HTTP error loading translations:', response.status, response.statusText);\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                const data = await response.json();\r\n                \r\n                if (data.success) {\r\n                    translations = data.translations;\r\n                    currentLanguage = data.current_language;\r\n                    updateLanguageDisplay(currentLanguage);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update page content with new translations\r\n                    updatePageContent();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    console.error('❌ Failed to load translations:', data.message || 'Unknown error');\r\n                }\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('❌ Error loading translations:', error);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Update page content with translations\r\n",

            "text": "    \u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.1.3/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 153,
            "text": "        // Global translations object\r"

            "text": "        let translations = {};\r"

            "lineNumber": 161,

            "text": "            loadTranslations();\r"

          {

            "text": "            setupLanguageToggle();\r"

            "text": "        });\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "        // Load translations\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "        async function loadTranslations() {\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \u003c!-- Bootstrap JS and dependencies --\u003e\r\n    \u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.1.3/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Language switching functionality --\u003e\r\n    \u003cscript\u003e\r\n        // Global translations object\r\n        let translations = {};\r\n        let currentLanguage = 'en';\r\n        \r\n        // Make translations globally accessible\r\n        window.translations = translations;\r\n        \r\n        // Initialize language system\r\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n            loadTranslations();\r\n            setupLanguageToggle();\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Load translations\r\n        async function loadTranslations() {\r\n            try {\r\n                const response = await fetch('/league/get_translations');\r\n                \r\n                if (!response.ok) {\r\n                    console.error('❌ HTTP error loading translations:', response.status, response.statusText);\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                const data = await response.json();\r\n                \r\n                if (data.success) {\r\n                    translations = data.translations;\r\n                    currentLanguage = data.current_language;\r\n                    updateLanguageDisplay(currentLanguage);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update page content with new translations\r\n                    updatePageContent();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    console.error('❌ Failed to load translations:', data.message || 'Unknown error');\r\n                }\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('❌ Error loading translations:', error);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Update page content with translations\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

            "line": 194
          },

            "column": 8,

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        function switchPalette(palette) {\r\n            // Update palette display\r\n            const textElement = document.getElementById('currentPaletteText');\r\n            if (textElement) {\r\n                if (palette === 'harmonic10') {\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'Harmonic 10';\r\n                } else if (palette === 'rainbowPastel') {\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'Rainbow Pastel';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Trigger palette change event\r\n            window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('paletteChanged', { detail: { palette } }));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Initialize everything when DOM is loaded\r\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n            console.log('🚀 Initializing application...');\r\n            \r\n            // Setup selectors\r\n            setupLanguageSelector();\r\n            setupPaletteSelector();\r\n            \r\n            // Load initial data\r\n            loadTranslations();\r\n            \r\n            // Setup global database change listener\r\n            setupGlobalDatabaseListener();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ Application initialized');\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Global database change listener\r\n        function setupGlobalDatabaseListener() {\r\n            window.addEventListener('databaseChanged', async (event) =\u003e {\r\n                console.log('🌐 Global database change detected:', event.detail);\r\n                \r\n                // Wait a moment for the server to process the change\r\n                await new Promise(resolve =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, 300));\r\n                \r\n                // Try to refresh any active components\r\n                await refreshActiveComponents();\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Refresh active components based on current page\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "        function switchPalette(palette) {\r\n            // Update palette display\r\n            const textElement = document.getElementById('currentPaletteText');\r\n            if (textElement) {\r\n                if (palette === 'harmonic10') {\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'Harmonic 10';\r\n                } else if (palette === 'rainbowPastel') {\r\n                    textElement.textContent = 'Rainbow Pastel';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Trigger palette change event\r\n            window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('paletteChanged', { detail: { palette } }));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Initialize everything when DOM is loaded\r\n        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n            console.log('🚀 Initializing application...');\r\n            \r\n            // Setup selectors\r\n            setupLanguageSelector();\r\n            setupPaletteSelector();\r\n            \r\n            // Load initial data\r\n            loadTranslations();\r\n            \r\n            // Setup global database change listener\r\n            setupGlobalDatabaseListener();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ Application initialized');\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Global database change listener\r\n        function setupGlobalDatabaseListener() {\r\n            window.addEventListener('databaseChanged', async (event) =\u003e {\r\n                console.log('🌐 Global database change detected:', event.detail);\r\n                \r\n                // Wait a moment for the server to process the change\r\n                await new Promise(resolve =\u003e setTimeout(resolve, 300));\r\n                \r\n                // Try to refresh any active components\r\n                await refreshActiveComponents();\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Refresh active components based on current page\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 12,
            "line": 434
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 384
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/base.html"
      },
      "score": 0.43525493144989014
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "            if (typeof Highcharts !== 'undefined' \u0026\u0026 Highcharts.charts) {\r\n                Highcharts.charts.forEach(chart =\u003e {\r\n                    if (chart \u0026\u0026 chart.xAxis \u0026\u0026 chart.xAxis[0]) {\r\n                        const xAxis = chart.xAxis[0];\r\n                        if (xAxis.categories) {\r\n                            xAxis.categories = xAxis.categories.map(category =\u003e {\r\n                                if (typeof category === 'string' \u0026\u0026 category.includes('Match Day')) {\r\n                                    const weekMatch = category.match(/Match Day #?(\\d+)/);\r\n                                    if (weekMatch) {\r\n                                        const week = weekMatch[1];\r\n                                        return matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', week);\r\n                                    }\r\n                                    return category.replace('Match Day', matchDayLabel);\r\n                                }\r\n                                return category;\r\n                            });\r\n                            chart.redraw();\r\n                        }\r\n                    }\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Helper function to get translated text\r\n        function t(key) {\r\n            return translations[key] || key;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Setup language toggle functionality\r\n        function setupLanguageToggle() {\r\n            const languageItems = document.querySelectorAll('[data-language]');\r\n            \r\n            languageItems.forEach(item =\u003e {\r\n                item.addEventListener('click', async function(e) {\r\n                    e.preventDefault();\r\n                    const language = this.getAttribute('data-language');\r\n                    await switchLanguage(language);\r\n                });\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Switch language\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        try {\r\n            console.log(&#96;🔄 Switching database to: ${sourceId}&#96;);\r\n            \r\n            // First, try to switch via AJAX to avoid page reload\r\n            const response = await fetch('/main/switch-database', {\r\n                method: 'POST',\r\n                headers: {\r\n                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n                },\r\n                body: JSON.stringify({ database: sourceId })\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            const data = await response.json();\r\n            \r\n            if (data.success) {\r\n                console.log('✅ Database switched successfully via AJAX');\r\n                \r\n                // Update URL without page reload\r\n                const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n                url.searchParams.set('database', sourceId);\r\n                window.history.pushState({}, '', url.toString());\r\n                \r\n                // Update the display\r\n                this.currentSource = sourceId;\r\n                this.updateDisplay();\r\n                this.renderOptions();\r\n                \r\n                // Trigger a global event to notify other components\r\n                window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('databaseChanged', { \r\n                    detail: { database: sourceId } \r\n                }));\r\n                \r\n                // Show success message\r\n                this.showSuccess(&#96;Switched to ${this.sourcesInfo[sourceId]?.display_name || sourceId}&#96;);\r\n                \r\n            } else {\r\n                console.warn('AJAX switch failed, falling back to page reload');\r\n                // Fallback to page reload if AJAX fails\r\n                const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n                url.searchParams.set('database', sourceId);\r\n                window.location.href = url.toString();\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n        ",

        "contents": "                    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n                        document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(function(el) {\r\n                            el.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\r\n                                e.preventDefault();\r\n                                const palette = el.getAttribute('data-palette');\r\n                                const text = el.textContent.trim();\r\n                                \r\n                                // Update navbar text\r\n                                const paletteText = document.getElementById('currentPaletteText');\r\n                                if (paletteText) paletteText.textContent = text;\r\n                                \r\n                                // Trigger palette change event if handler exists\r\n                                if (typeof window.handlePaletteChange === 'function') {\r\n                                    window.handlePaletteChange();\r\n                                }\r\n                            });\r\n                        });\r\n                        \r\n                        // Refresh button handler\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".database-notification.alert-success {\r\n    background-color: #d4edda;\r\n    border-left: 4px solid #28a745;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.database-notification.alert-danger {\r\n    background-color: #f8d7da;\r\n    border-left: 4px solid #dc3545;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.database-notification.alert-info {\r\n    background-color: #d1ecf1;\r\n    border-left: 4px solid #17a2b8;\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nclass DatabaseSelector {\r\n    constructor() {\r\n        this.isLoading = false;\r\n        this.currentSource = null;\r\n        this.sourcesInfo = {};\r\n        this.init();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async init() {\r\n        await this.loadSourcesInfo();\r\n        this.setupEventListeners();\r\n        this.updateDisplay();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async loadSourcesInfo() {\r\n        try {\r\n            // Get current database from URL\r\n            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n            const currentDatabase = urlParams.get('database');\r\n            \r\n            // Build the URL with database parameter if present\r\n            let url = '/get-data-sources-info';\r\n            if (currentDatabase) {\r\n                url += &#96;?database=${encodeURIComponent(currentDatabase)}&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            const response = await fetch(url, {\r\n                headers: { 'Cache-Control': 'no-cache' }\r\n            });\r\n            const data = await response.json();\r\n            \r\n            console.log('Sources info response:', data);\r\n            \r\n            if (data.success) {\r\n                this.sourcesInfo = data.sources_info;\r\n                this.currentSource = data.current_source;\r\n                console.log('Loaded sources info:', this.sourcesInfo);\r\n                console.log('Current source:', this.currentSource);\r\n                this.renderOptions();\r\n            } else {\r\n                console.error('Failed to load sources info:', data.message);\r\n                this.showError('Failed to load database information');\r\n            }\r\n        ",

        "contents": "        function updatePageContent() {\r\n            // Update all elements with data-i18n attributes\r\n            const elements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]');\r\n            elements.forEach(element =\u003e {\r\n                const key = element.getAttribute('data-i18n');\r\n                if (translations[key]) {\r\n                    element.textContent = translations[key];\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Update chart labels if charts exist\r\n            updateChartLabels();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Update chart labels\r\n        function updateChartLabels() {\r\n            const matchDayLabel = translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day';\r\n            const matchDayFormat = translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            \r\n            // Update any existing Chart.js charts that use week labels\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        function refreshCurrentData() {\r\n            // Check if we're on the league stats page\r\n            if (window.location.pathname.includes('/league/stats')) {\r\n                // Trigger a refresh of the current data\r\n                const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                \r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n                    // Refresh league table\r\n                    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n                        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Refresh team details if team is selected\r\n                    if (selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 selectedWeek) {\r\n                        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Refresh charts\r\n                    if (typeof updateChartsLeague === 'function') {\r\n                        updateChartsLeague();\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Update language display in navbar\r\n",

        "originalContents": "        function refreshCurrentData() {\r\n            // Check if we're on the league stats page\r\n            if (window.location.pathname.includes('/league/stats')) {\r\n                // Trigger a refresh of the current data\r\n                const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n                \r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n                    // Refresh league table\r\n                    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n                        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Refresh team details if team is selected\r\n                    if (selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 selectedWeek) {\r\n                        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Refresh charts\r\n                    if (typeof updateChartsLeague === 'function') {\r\n                        updateChartsLeague();\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Update language display in navbar\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class CentralizedButtonManager {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Set up event listeners for button changes\r\n     */\r\n    setupButtonEventListeners() {\r\n        // Use event delegation for all filter buttons\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const target = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            if (target.type === 'radio' \u0026\u0026 this.buttonGroups[target.name]) {\r\n                const groupName = target.name;\r\n                const value = target.value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log(&#96;🎯 CentralizedButtonManager: Button changed - ${groupName}: ${value}&#96;);\r\n                \r\n                // Update selected values and constraints, but NOT currentState yet\r\n                this.selectedValues[groupName] = value;\r\n                this.constraints[groupName] = value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log(&#96;🎯 CentralizedButtonManager: Updated constraints:&#96;, this.constraints);\r\n                \r\n                // Update URL state (this will trigger handleStateChange)\r\n                this.urlStateManager.setState({ [groupName]: value });\r\n            }\r\n        });",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Set up event listeners for button changes\r\n     */\r\n    setupButtonEventListeners() {\r\n        // Use event delegation for all filter buttons\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const target = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            if (target.type === 'radio' \u0026\u0026 this.buttonGroups[target.name]) {\r\n                const groupName = target.name;\r\n                const value = target.value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log(&#96;🎯 CentralizedButtonManager: Button changed - ${groupName}: ${value}&#96;);\r\n                \r\n                // Update selected values and constraints, but NOT currentState yet\r\n                this.selectedValues[groupName] = value;\r\n                this.constraints[groupName] = value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log(&#96;🎯 CentralizedButtonManager: Updated constraints:&#96;, this.constraints);\r\n                \r\n                // Update URL state (this will trigger handleStateChange)\r\n                this.urlStateManager.setState({ [groupName]: value });\r\n            }\r\n        });",

        "contents": "} catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Error switching database:', error);\r\n            console.log('Falling back to page reload method');\r\n            \r\n            // Fallback to page reload\r\n            const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n            url.searchParams.set('database', sourceId);\r\n            window.location.href = url.toString();\r\n        } finally {\r\n            this.isLoading = false;\r\n            this.hideLoadingState();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    async refreshDynamicComponents() {\r\n        console.log('🔄 Refreshing dynamic components after database switch...');\r\n        \r\n        // Wait a moment for the server to fully process the database switch\r\n        await new Promise(resolve =\u003e         "contents": "\u003c!-- Core dependencies --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/core/url-state-manager.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Content blocks --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/season-league-standings-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/league-aggregation-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/league-season-overview-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/season-overview-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/matchday-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/team-details-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/team-performance-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/content-blocks/team-win-percentage-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{      this.urlStateManager = new URLStateManager({\r\n                onStateChange: (state) =\u003e {\r\n                    console.log('API Test URL state changed:', state);\r\n                    this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...state };\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update global currentState for legacy compatibility\r\n                    if (typeof window.currentState !== 'undefined') {\r\n                        Object.assign(window.currentState, state);\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        window.currentState = { ...this.currentState };\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                        this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update filter controls\r\n                    this.updateFilterDisplays();\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            // Get initial state from URL\r\n            this.currentState = { ...this.currentState, ...this.urlStateManager.getState() };\r\n            window.currentState = { ...this.currentState };\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize content renderer\r\n            this.contentRenderer = new APITestContentRenderer(this.urlStateManager);\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize centralized button manager for league mode with content rendering callback\r\n                this.currentState = { ...state };\r\n                if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                    this.contentRenderer.renderContent(state);\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            await this.buttonManager.initialize();",
```

```json
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/set_language', methods=['POST'])\r\ndef set_language():\r\n    \"\"\"Set the current language\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        data = request.get_json()\r\n        language_code = data.get('language')\r\n        \r\n        if language_code == 'en':\r\n            i18n_service.set_language(Language.ENGLISH)\r\n        elif language_code == 'de':\r\n            i18n_service.set_language(Language.GERMAN)\r\n        else:\r\n            return jsonify({\"error\": \"Invalid language code\"}), 400\r\n        \r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            \"success\": True,\r\n            \"language\": language_code,\r\n            \"available_languages\": i18n_service.get_available_languages()\r\n        })\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\nfrom app.config.debug_config import debug_config\r\nfrom app.models.table_data import TableData, ColumnGroup, Column\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_league_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get LeagueService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database') or 'db_real'  # Default to db_real if no database specified\r\n    debug_config.log_service('LeagueService', 'create', f\"database={database}\")\r\n    return LeagueService(database=database)",

        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.league_service import LeagueService\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom app.services.i18n_service import i18n_service, Language\r\nfrom business_logic.statistics import query_database\r\nfrom data_access.adapters.data_adapter_factory import DataAdapterSelector\r\nimport traceback\r\nimport sys\r\nfrom app.services.data_dict import DataDict\r\nfrom app.config.debug_config import debug_config\r\nfrom app.models.table_data import TableData, ColumnGroup, Column\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('league', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_league_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get LeagueService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database') or 'db_real'  # Default to db_real if no database specified\r\n    debug_config.log_service('LeagueService', 'create', f\"database={database}\")\r\n    return LeagueService(database=database)",

        "contents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.player_service import PlayerService\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('player', __name__, url_prefix='/player')\r\n\r\ndef get_player_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get PlayerService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database') or 'db_sim'  # Default to db_sim if no database specified\r\n    return PlayerService(database=database)",

        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, jsonify, request\r\nfrom app.services.player_service import PlayerService\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('player', __name__, url_prefix='/player')\r\n\r\ndef get_player_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get PlayerService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database') or 'db_sim'  # Default to db_sim if no database specified\r\n    return PlayerService(database=database)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/switch-database', methods=['POST'])\r\ndef switch_database():\r\n    \"\"\"Switch database via AJAX\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from flask import request, jsonify\r\n        from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        data = request.get_json()\r\n        database = data.get('database')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"🔄 Database switch request received: {database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database specified'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Validate the database exists\r\n        if not database_config.validate_source(database):\r\n            available = database_config.get_available_sources()\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Invalid database: {database}. Available: {available}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"✅ Database {database} is valid, proceeding with switch\")\r\n        \r\n        # Force the database switch\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        success = data_manager.force_source(database)\r\n        \r\n        if success:\r\n            print(f\"✅ Successfully switched to {database}\")\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'message': f'Successfully switched to {database}',\r\n                'database': database,\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source\r\n            })\r\n        else:\r\n            print(f\"❌ Failed to switch to {database}\")\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Failed to switch to {database}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n            \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in switch_database: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'message': f'Error switching database: {str(e)}'\r\n        }), 500",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,

          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "@bp.route('/get-data-sources-info')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,

            "text": "def get_data_sources_info():\r"

            "text": "    try:"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/switch-database', methods=['POST'])\r\ndef switch_database():\r\n    \"\"\"Switch database via AJAX\"\"\"\r\n    try:\r\n        from flask import request, jsonify\r\n        from app.services.data_manager import DataManager\r\n        from app.config.database_config import database_config\r\n        \r\n        data = request.get_json()\r\n        database = data.get('database')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"🔄 Database switch request received: {database}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not database:\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': 'No database specified'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Validate the database exists\r\n        if not database_config.validate_source(database):\r\n            available = database_config.get_available_sources()\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Invalid database: {database}. Available: {available}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"✅ Database {database} is valid, proceeding with switch\")\r\n        \r\n        # Force the database switch\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        success = data_manager.force_source(database)\r\n        \r\n        if success:\r\n            print(f\"✅ Successfully switched to {database}\")\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'message': f'Successfully switched to {database}',\r\n                'database': database,\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source\r\n            })\r\n        else:\r\n            print(f\"❌ Failed to switch to {database}\")\r\n            return jsonify({\r\n                'success': False,\r\n                'message': f'Failed to switch to {database}'\r\n            }), 400\r\n            \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"❌ Error in switch_database: {str(e)}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'message': f'Error switching database: {str(e)}'\r\n        }), 500",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 148
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 37
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/routes/main.py"
      },
      "score": 0.2416878342628479
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-sources-info')\r\ndef get_data_sources_info():\r\n    try:\r\n        # Get database parameter from request\r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        \r\n        if database:\r\n            # Use the specified database\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Validate the database\r\n            if not data_manager.validate_source(database):\r\n                return {\r\n                    'success': False,\r\n                    'message': f'Invalid data source: {database}',\r\n                    'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources()\r\n                }, 400\r\n            \r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': database,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(database),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }\r\n        else:\r\n            # Use current session-based approach, but reset to new default if needed\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Check if session has old default and reset to new default\r\n            session_source = data_manager._get_session_source()\r\n            current_default = data_manager.get_default_source()\r\n            if session_source != current_default:\r\n                # Reset to new default\r\n                data_manager.reset_to_default()\r\n            else:\r\n                # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n                data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-sources-info')\r\ndef get_data_sources_info():\r\n    try:\r\n        # Get database parameter from request\r\n        database = request.args.get('database')\r\n        \r\n        if database:\r\n            # Use the specified database\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Validate the database\r\n            if not data_manager.validate_source(database):\r\n                return {\r\n                    'success': False,\r\n                    'message': f'Invalid data source: {database}',\r\n                    'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources()\r\n                }, 400\r\n            \r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': database,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(database),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }\r\n        else:\r\n            # Use current session-based approach, but reset to new default if needed\r\n            data_manager = DataManager()\r\n            # Check if session has old default and reset to new default\r\n            session_source = data_manager._get_session_source()\r\n            current_default = data_manager.get_default_source()\r\n            if session_source != current_default:\r\n                # Reset to new default\r\n                data_manager.reset_to_default()\r\n            else:\r\n                # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n                data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n            return {\r\n                'success': True,\r\n                'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n                'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n                'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n                'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n            }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, request, jsonify\r\nfrom app.services.team_service import TeamService\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('team', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_team_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get TeamService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database') or 'db_real'  # Default to db_real if no database specified\r\n    return TeamService(database=database)",

        ],
        "originalContents": "from flask import Blueprint, render_template, request, jsonify\r\nfrom app.services.team_service import TeamService\r\n\r\nbp = Blueprint('team', __name__)\r\n\r\ndef get_team_service():\r\n    \"\"\"Helper function to get TeamService with database parameter\"\"\"\r\n    database = request.args.get('database') or 'db_real'  # Default to db_real if no database specified\r\n    return TeamService(database=database)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "@bp.route('/league/get_translations')\n\r\n\r\n...\n\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_individual_scores_table')\r\ndef get_team_individual_scores_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_individual_scores_table(\r\n            league=league,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            team=team,\r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_individual_scores_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "# AGGREGATION ENDPOINTS (League-wide over time)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "# ==========================================\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 536,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 537,
            "text": "@bp.route('/league/get_league_averages_history')\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 538,
            "text": "def get_league_averages_history():\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "    \"\"\"Get league average scores across all seasons\"\"\""
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_individual_scores_table')\r\ndef get_team_individual_scores_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        league_service = get_league_service()\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_individual_scores_table(\r\n            league=league,\r\n            season=season,\r\n            team=team,\r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_individual_scores_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 554
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 46,
            "line": 470
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/routes/league_routes.py"
      },
      "score": 0.22653569281101227
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-source')\r\ndef get_data_source():\r\n    try:\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n        data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': True,\r\n            'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n            'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n            'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n            'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n        }\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"ERROR: Exception in get_data_source: {e}\")\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'current_source': 'db_sim',\r\n            'current_display_name': 'Simulated Data',\r\n            'available_sources': ['db_sim', 'db_real'],\r\n            'message': f'Server error: {str(e)}'\r\n        }, 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/get-data-source')\r\ndef get_data_source():\r\n    try:\r\n        data_manager = DataManager()\r\n        # Force reload from session to ensure consistency across workers\r\n        data_manager.force_reload_from_session()\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': True,\r\n            'current_source': data_manager.current_source,\r\n            'current_display_name': data_manager.get_source_display_name(data_manager.current_source),\r\n            'available_sources': data_manager.get_available_sources(),\r\n            'sources_info': data_manager.get_sources_info()\r\n        }\r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        print(f\"ERROR: Exception in get_data_source: {e}\")\r\n        return {\r\n            'success': False,\r\n            'current_source': 'db_sim',\r\n            'current_display_name': 'Simulated Data',\r\n            'available_sources': ['db_sim', 'db_real'],\r\n            'message': f'Server error: {str(e)}'\r\n        }, 500",
```
